AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_18.english: And when it comes to figure, I wouldn't be outdone even against Rebecca!
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_18.korean: 그리고 몸매라면 레베카랑 붙어도 절대 안 밀리거든!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_19.english: I'm saying this because I'm worried as your partner, but that is clearly excessive self-consciousness. You aren't saying that while knowing about the existence of that tiny, bite-sized plum, are you?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_19.korean:
파트너로서 걱정돼서 그러는 건데, 너 그거 엄연한 자의식 과잉이다? 
설마 그 조그만 한입 짜리 자두의 존재를 알면서도 그런 소리를 하는 거야?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_2.english: I'm about to get moving, so get ready.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_20.english: How can you look at this chest, Jadu! Have you ever seen a Jadu this big?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_20.korean: 이 가슴이 어딜 봐서 자두야! 너 이렇게 큰 자두 봤어?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_21.english: It's just that I look flattened by the suit right now, but I'm awesome once I take it off!
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_21.korean: 지금은 슈트 때문에 눌려서 그렇지, 벗으면 굉장하거든!?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_22.english: Orange… no, it’s at least an apple!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_23.english: Are you seriously talking about a Ruby-S apple? It should at least be a Melon, shouldn't it?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_23.korean: 그 사과라는 게 설마 루비에스 사과 말하는 거야? 적어도 멜론은 돼야 하지 않겠어?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_26.english: Ugh…! I got caught because of you!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_27.english: So what? I was planning to break through head-on anyway.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_27.korean: 뭐 어때? 어차피 정면으로 뚫고 들어갈 생각이었어.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_28.english: If the mission fails, it's all your fault! Got it, you blockhead?!
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_28.korean: 임무 실패하면 전부 네 책임야! 알겠냐, 돌대가리?!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_29.english: Then follow along carefully so you don't fail.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_29.korean: 그럼 실패 안 하게 잘 따라오ㅡ

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_3.english: Hmm... no, I think it would be better to change the plan.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_3.korean: 음… 아니, 계획을 변경하는 게 좋겠어.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_30.english: Sorry, I need to go to the bathroom!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_31.english: What!? I was just about to get excited...!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_32.english: What were you doing instead of going before the movie started?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_32.korean: 영화 시작하기 전에 안 다녀오고 뭐 한 거야?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_33.english: I didn't need to pee back then!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_36.english: Ahaha... Please don't be too harsh on me.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_37.english: Because it seems like I’ve been holding it in for quite a long time.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_38.english: That’s perfect timing. I’ll get some more to drink.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_38.korean:
마침 잘 됐네.
나는 마실 것 좀 더 가져올게.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_39.english: Oh, please take care of mine too!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_4.english: It looks like the security guards will arrive much sooner than expected.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_4.korean: 경비원들이 예상보다 훨씬 빠르게 도착할 모양이야.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_41.english: Well then… I guess I should go smoke a cigarette too.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_41.korean: 그럼… 나도 한 대 피우고 와야겠군.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_42.english: The hyena went to the bathroom, so I suddenly needed to pee too…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_42.korean: 하이에나가 화장실 가니까 나도 갑자기 마려워졌어…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_43.english: Then why don't you go right now?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_43.korean: 그럼 지금 빨리 다녀오시는 게 어때요?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_44.english: It's okay. I can still hold out a little longer.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_44.korean: 괜찮아. 아직은 더 참을 수 있어.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_45.english: Besides, I still have a trump card left.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_48.english: Gather the empty beverage cans here…
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_48.korean: 여기 다 마신 음료수 캔을 모아서…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_49.english: Go now while I'm still being nice.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_49.korean: 좋은 말 할 때 지금 다녀와.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_5.english: What? Then we have to deal with the target somewhere other than the VIP lounge.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_5.korean: 뭐? 그러면 타깃을 VIP 라운지가 아닌 곳에서 처리해야 되잖아.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_53.english: Ahaha... for some reason, I suddenly feel the urge to go too...
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_53.korean: 아하하… 왠지 모르게 저도 조금 마려워져서요…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_59.english: Uhuhu... Watching a movie with Captain Khan...

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_63.english: Huh? What? Where did everyone go?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_65.english: It looks like they have no intention of letting you go on good terms.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_65.korean: 아무래도 좋게 보내줄 생각은 없나 보네.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_67.english: Honestly, I wasn't happy about it at first, but the missions I did with you... looking back now, they weren't as bad as I thought...
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_67.korean: 솔직히 처음엔 못마땅했지만, 너랑 했던 임무들… 지금 와서 돌이켜보니 생각보다 나쁘지 않았어…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_70.english: You almost got a hole in your head! And why are you spouting such useless lines that sound like a last will and testament!
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_70.korean: 머리에 구멍 날 뻔했잖아! 그리고 쓸데없이 왜 유언 같은 대사를 뱉는 거야!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_71.english: Just... because the atmosphere was exactly like that?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_73.english: No matter what happens, I will come back alive with you.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_73.korean: 나는 무슨 일이 있어도 너랑 같이 살아 돌아갈 거야.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_75.english: If that is the partner's plan, then there is nothing I can do...
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_75.korean: 파트너의 계획이 그렇다면야 어쩔 수 없지…

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_76.english: We have no choice but to go back alive with the gangster gorilla!
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_76.korean: 조폭 고릴라랑 같이 살아서 돌아가는 수밖에!

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_77.english: Oh... something is exploding like crazy.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_79.english: You must have had a hard time taking that picture.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_8.english: Now that you have become my partner, you must execute the operation exactly as agreed upon in advance.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_8.korean: 나랑 파트너가 된 이상, 반드시 작전은 사전에 협의한 계획대로 이행한다.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_80.english: I've never watched a movie all the way to the end like this before; it's fun.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_80.korean: 영화라는 걸 이렇게 끝까지 본 적 없었는데, 재미있네요.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_82.english: I don't really enjoy watching movies either, but... it's not bad sometimes.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_82.korean: 나도 영화를 즐겨 보진 않지만… 가끔은 나쁘지 않군.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_83.english: I especially like this last scene.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_83.korean: 특히 이 마지막 장면, 마음에 들어.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_84.english: … That’s cool. It makes me want to try something like that at least once.
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_84.korean:
…멋지군.
나도 한 번쯤 저런 걸 해보고 싶다는 생각이 든다.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_9.english: Do you think I became your partner because I wanted to?
AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_9.korean: 내가 뭐 원해서 너랑 파트너가 됐나?

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_92.english: Thank you for inviting me to see you today.

AcrossTheMilkyway1ED_93.english: If I have the chance, I will come to see you again.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_1.english: Then, we will begin the 1st Horde Emergency Meeting.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_11.english: What do you think of Keshik?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_12.english: Even if you ask what I think…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_13.english: What is this emergency meeting for in the first place?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_14.english: You heard it next to me yesterday, too, right?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_15.english: Captain Khan watched the movie and said, "It's cool," adding, "I wish I could do something like that too."
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_15.korean: 칸 대장이 영화를 보고 '멋지다'면서 '자기도 저런 걸 해봤으면 좋겠다'고 말한거.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_16.english: Ah… so that was the reason…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_17.english: I thought it was unexpected too, but is it really necessary for everyone to gather like this?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_17.korean: 저도 의외라고 생각하긴 했지만, 이렇게까지 모두가 모일 일인가요?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_18.english: You've been here for a long time now, so you should know, right?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_18.korean: 너도 이제 여기에 오래 있었으니까 잘 알 거 아니야?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_19.korean: 우리 대장이 얼마나 욕심이 없는 사람인지.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_2.english: I'm telling you, Captain Khan must have been drawn to the intense action, too!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_2.korean: 역시 칸 대장도 뜨거운 액션에 끌린 게 틀림없다니까?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_20.english: Hmm... certainly... I don't recall Captain Khan ever mentioning that he wanted to have or do anything until now.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_20.korean: 음… 확실히… 칸 대장님이 지금까지 뭔가 가지고 싶다던가, 하고 싶다는 말을 꺼낸 기억이 없네요.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_21.english: But for the first time, the Captain said he wanted to try it himself!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_21.korean: 그런데 그런 대장님이 처음으로 직접 해보고 싶다는 말을 꺼냈어요!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_22.english: This is a critical matter for the Horde… no, for all of Orca!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_22.korean: 이건 호드에서… 아니 오르카 전체의 중대 사항이라고요!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_24.english: In that case, there is only one thing our Horde must do…
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_24.korean: 그렇다면 우리 호드가 해야 할 일은 하나뿐…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_26.english: I like it! I think this looks like fun!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_26.korean: 나는 좋아! 이거 재밌을 거 같은데!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_27.english: I'm really curious what Captain Khan wants.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_27.korean: 칸 대장이 원하는 게 뭔지 정말 궁금한걸?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_29.english: I'm not *that* interested, but... I guess it can't be helped...
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_29.korean: 나는 그렇게까지 흥미가 있는 건 아니지만… 어쩔 수 없나…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_3.english: But compared to Captain Khan's usual fighting style, isn't that slow and boring?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_3.korean: 라고 하기에는 칸 대장의 평소 전투 방식에 비하면 저건 느리고 시시하잖아?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_30.english: I owe Captain Khan a lot, so something like this wouldn't be bad once in a while.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_30.korean:
평소에 칸 대장에게는 신세를 많이 졌으니까.
가끔은 이런 것도 나쁘지 않겠지.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_33.english: Okay. I'd like to do something for Captain Khan too!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_33.korean: 좋아요. 저도 칸 대장님을 위해서라면 뭔가 해드리고 싶어요!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_35.english: Let's all join forces and make sure to find and fulfill what Captain Khan wants!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_35.korean: 우리 모두 힘을 합쳐서, 칸 대장님이 바라시는 걸 꼭 찾아내 이뤄드리는 거예요!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_38.english: Ugh…! You’re right next to me!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_4.english: In that case, is it the story side?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_40.english: Hold on tight! We're breaking through like this!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_44.english: The night view after the mission is over is really beautiful…
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_44.korean: 미션이 끝난 후 보는 야경은 정말 아름답네…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_45.english: The night view is pretty, but…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_46.english: I think the one next to you is prettier.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_46.korean: 나는 옆에 있는 네가 더 예쁜 거 같은데?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_47.english: Looks like you hit your head hard...

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_49.english: Uhuhu... Still... I don't dislike it...

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_5.english: Hmm... considering Captain Khan's reaction, that probably isn't it.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_5.korean: 음… 칸 대장님의 반응을 생각하면 그건 아닐 거예요.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_50.english: It's a great movie to watch again.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_51.english: I understand why, since it was a popular movie before the apocalypse.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_51.korean: 멸망 전 인기가 많았던 영화라는데 이해가 가요.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_52.english: Hmm... but what exactly in this final highlight scene did Captain Khan see that made him say it was cool?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_52.korean: 음… 그런데 칸 대장님은 이 마지막 하이라이트 장면의 어디를 보고 멋지다고 한 걸까요?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_55.english: I think I know that, too!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_56.english: Even if you pretend not to care, you are a woman after all, Captain.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_56.korean: 관심 없는 척하셔봤자 대장님도 결국은 여자이니까.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_57.english: Of course it’s a high-speed sports car! Wouldn’t he be a cool guy? It’s artistic explosive action! And it must be a glamorous dress.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_57.korean:
당연히 질주하는 스포츠 카지!
멋진 남자지 않겠어?
예술적인 폭발 액션이야!
화려한 드레스겠지.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_59.english: No, no, it's the Khan of Speed, isn't it? I told you it's a sports car, driven by the instinct to race!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_59.korean: 아니, 아니 신속의 칸이잖아? 질주 본능에 따라 스포츠 카라니까?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_6.english: Captain Khan must be impressed by the spectacular explosion, too!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_6.korean: 칸 대장도 분명 화려한 폭발에 감명을 받는 걸 거야!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_60.english: Of course it's a sweet romance with a handsome guy, isn't it?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_60.korean: 당연히 멋진 남자와의 알콩달콩 로맨스 아니야?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_61.english: Isn't the coolest action the one where you smash enemies with artistic explosions?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_61.korean: 예술적인 폭발로 적들을 박살 내는 액션이 제일 멋지지 않아?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_62.english: It’s only natural to want to try on a glamorous party dress that grabs everyone's attention.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_62.korean: 이목을 한몸에 받는 화려한 파티 드레스를 입어 보고 싶은 게 당연하잖아.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_66.english: Hmm... I'm not entirely sure, but I don't think Captain Khan's taste is among what's been shown so far.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_66.korean: 음… 확신할 수 없지만, 지금 나온 것들 중에서는 칸 대장님의 취향이 없는 것 같아요.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_68.english: So, Feather, do you know what Captain Khan wants?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_68.korean: 그럼 페더, 너는 칸 대장이 원하는 게 뭔지 알겠어?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_7.english: Yawn~ I still have work left to do...
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_7.korean: 후아암~ 나 아직 할 일이 남았는데 말이지…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_70.english: Honestly, I don't really know either.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_71.english: Since Captain Khan has never expressed what he wants so directly like this...
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_71.korean: 칸 대장님이 이렇게 직접적으로 원하는 걸 표현한 적이 없으시다 보니…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_72.english: Ah, of course! Though, that is an exception for you, Commander!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_73.english: If you, who know Captain Khan better than anyone, say that, it’s practically the same as saying no one here knows.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_73.korean: 칸 대장님을 누구보다 잘 아는 네가 그렇게 말하면, 여기선 아무도 모르는 거나 다름없는 거야.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_74.english: Hmm... I see... What should we do...

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_76.english: Since things have turned out this way, why don't we try everything?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_76.korean: 이렇게 된 이상 전부 해보는 건 어때요?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_79.english: Contrary to expectations, there might be some correct ones among them.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_79.korean: 예상과 다르게 저 중에 맞는 게 있을 수도 있잖아요.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_8.english: This is an important matter, so please pay attention.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_80.english: And above all, isn't it important that we are doing something for Captain Khan?
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_80.korean: 그리고 무엇보다 저희들이 칸 대장님을 위해 무언가 해드린다는 게 중요한 게 아닐까요?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_82.english: Yeah, who cares what the boss wants? What matters is that we all did something together!
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_82.korean: 그래, 대장이 뭘 원하든 뭐가 중요하겠어 우리가 다 같이 뭔갈 해줬다는 게 중요하지!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_83.english: Okay, then shall we get started right away?

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_84.english: Haa... I knew it would happen, but is it really going to end like this...
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_84.korean: 하아… 알고 있었지만 결국 이렇게 되는 건가…

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_85.english: Hahaha! Looks like it'll be fun!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_86.english: Well then, everyone, be careful not to get caught by Captain Khan for the time being.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_86.korean: 그럼, 당분간 칸 대장에게 들키지 않도록 모두 조심해.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_87.english: Leave Captain Khan's surveillance to me!

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_90.english: No matter how you prepare things like a car or a dress.
AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_90.korean: 차나, 드레스 같은 건 어떻게 준비한다고 해도.

AcrossTheMilkyway2ED_91.english: How do you prepare to be a cool guy?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_1.english: So, you're saying Cannes said that after watching the movie...
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_1.korean: 칸이 영화를 보고 그런 말을 했다는 거지…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_10.english: Besides, I'm always getting help from Khan too.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_10.korean: 게다가 칸에게는 나도 늘 도움받고 있으니까.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_11.english: Whatever Khan wants, if he needs my help, I'll gladly assist him.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_11.korean: 칸이 뭘 원하든, 내 도움이 필요하다면 얼마든지 돕겠어.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_13.english: So, exactly what do I need to help you with?
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_13.korean: 그래서, 내가 정확히 뭘 도와주면 되는 거야?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_14.english: So you're saying it's what Khan wants... He's never clearly stated what he wanted until now.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_14.korean: 칸이 원하는 거라니… 지금까지 속시원히 뭔가를 원한다고 한 적 없었잖아.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_15.english: I'm curious what aspect of the movie made them say that.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_15.korean: 영화의 어떤 면을 보고 그런 말을 했는지 궁금해지네.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_16.english: Uh, well… we’re not entirely sure, but the conclusion we reached among ourselves is…
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_16.korean: 그, 그게… 확실하진 않지만 저희끼리 결론 내린 건…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_2.english: That's why you came to see me.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_24.english: I'm sorry! It's a bit much, isn't it?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_25.english: Please pretend this never happened! I'll explain everything to everyone!
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_25.korean: 없었던 일로 해주세요! 제가 모두에게 잘 말해둘게요!

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_26.english: No, it's fine. I've got the right address.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_27.english: I'll roll up my sleeves and help for Khan.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_27.korean: 칸을 위해서라면 내가 두 팔 걷고 도와줄게.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_30.english: If Khan wants a cool guy... I can't miss out.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_30.korean: 칸이 원하는 게 멋진 남자라면… 내가 빠질 수 없잖아.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_32.english: First, let me know how prepared you are so far.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_35.english: The only one prepared so far is… the Commander…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_36.english: Um, what is it... we did try our best to prepare, but...
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_36.korean: 그, 뭐냐… 우리도 나름 준비해보겠다고 노력은 했는데…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_37.english: Sports cars and dresses… they’re both such different fields that it’s hard for us to figure them out on our own.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_37.korean: 스포츠카에 드레스… 우리끼리 어떻게 해보기엔 두 가지다 너무 다른 분야이더라고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_38.english: And since flashy explosive action is dangerous in many ways, we decided to give up on it.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_38.korean: 그리고 화려한 폭발 액션은 여러모로 위험하니까 포기하기로 했고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_39.english: Hehe... I thought I'd be able to see a lovely explosion...
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_39.korean: 키힝... 사랑스러운 폭발을 볼 수 있을 줄 알았는데…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_4.english: I objected, saying I couldn't bother the Commander with something like this, but everyone insisted that his help was absolutely necessary...
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_4.korean:
이런 일로 사령관님을 번거롭게 해드릴 수 없다고 저는 반대했는데,
다들 꼭 사령관님의 도움이 필요하다고 해서…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_40.english: What about Scarabya and Talon feather?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_42.english: He sighed every second, saying he couldn't guarantee he could do it well...
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_42.korean: 잘할 수 있을지는 장담하기 힘들다면서… 초 단위로 한숨을 쉬더라.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_43.english: Talon feather is acting as a lookout to ensure Captain Khan doesn't find out we're preparing a surprise.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_43.korean: 탈론페더는 칸 대장한테 우리가 서프라이즈 준비하는 거 들키지 않게 감시역이고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_44.english: Well… it’s something I’ve always done.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_45.english: Okay. I've got a grasp of the situation.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_46.english: Let's prepare them one by one, in order.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_47.english: Kheshig, please go to the tailor and ask if they can prepare a dress that fits Khan.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_47.korean: 케시크는 테일러한테 가서 칸에게 맞는 드레스를 준비할 수 있는지 물어봐 줘.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_49.english: By the way, is it okay if I ask you this so suddenly?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_50.english: Hmm... then please pass this on. Tell them that they can postpone making my clothes, so please prioritize Khan.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_50.korean:
음… 그럼 이렇게 전해줘.
내 옷 제작은 미뤄도 되니까, 칸 쪽을 우선으로 부탁한다고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_51.english: Then I would be a nuisance to the Commander…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_52.english: It's okay. This is enough for me.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_53.english: Well then, risking being a nuisance… I’ll be back!

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_54.english: War Wolf and Salamander, go to the Orca Maintenance Squad and ask them to provide some support for the production of the Scarabya sports car.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_54.korean:
워울프랑 샐러맨더는 오르카 정비반으로 가서,
스카라비아 스포츠카 제작에 지원 좀 붙여달라고 요청해 줘.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_55.english: Please tell them that I approved the budget increase I mentioned earlier. Then I will gladly help you.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_55.korean:
전에 말한 예산 증액 건은 내가 승인했다고 해줘. 
그럼 흔쾌히 도와줄 거야.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_58.english: And as for the flashy action... it's a shame because there are so many unexpected things that can happen due to explosions, but I'm against it.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_58.korean: 그리고 화려한 액션은… 폭발로 인해 일어날 수 있는 돌발 사항들이 많아서 아쉽지만 반대야.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_59.english: Instead, if you have a sports car and a dress, you'll need a matching 'stage.' Like a movie set.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_59.korean: 대신 스포츠카랑 드레스가 있으면, 그에 맞는 '무대'가 필요할 거야. 영화를 찍기 위한 세트장처럼 말이야.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_6.english: No. You came to the right place.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_60.english: Quick Camel and Hyena, go to Lumberjane and ask him to set up a cool city nightscape.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_60.korean:
퀵 카멜이랑 하이에나는 럼버제인에게 가서
도시 야경 세팅을 멋지게 꾸며달라고 부탁해줘.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_61.english: Oh, and I also want to congratulate you on your promotion to director.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_61.korean: 아, 그리고 소장 승진 축하한다고도 전하고.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_63.english: Major General Lumberjane…? Not a Brigadier General?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_64.english: The big picture is set, and for the rest, we'll see how things go—
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_64.korean: 이걸로 큰 틀은 잡혔고, 나머지는 상황 보면서—

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_67.english: Why is the commander in the Horde quarters?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_68.english: Who are you here to meet?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_69.english: Uh... well... that's right! I was just looking around the base for a moment.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_69.korean: 어… 그게... 맞아! 그냥 잠깐 기지 쪽을 둘러보던 중이었어.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_7.english: If it's something like that, you can come visit anytime.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_70.english: I thought it would be nice to kill two birds with one stone and catch up with the Horde members!
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_70.korean: 겸사겸사 호드 대원들 얼굴도 보고, 얘기도 좀 하면 좋겠다, 싶어서!

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_72.english: Unfortunately, it looks like everyone is away right now.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_72.korean: 아쉽게도 지금은 다들 자리를 비운 모양이군.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_73.english: When I return later, I will let them know that the commander stopped by.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_74.english: … Ahaha, right? I'm sure everyone was here.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_74.korean: …아하하, 그러게? 다들 분명 여기 있었던 것 같은데?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_76.english: Since we happen to meet, may I ask just one thing?
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_76.korean: 마침 만난 김에 한 가지만 물어봐도 될까?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_78.english: Khan… does he have anything he wants from the Horde members?
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_78.korean: 칸은… 호드 대원들에게 바라는 게 있어?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_79.english: Is it what I want from everyone?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_8.english: Actually, I wish you would rely on me a little more.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_8.korean: 오히려 나를 좀 더 의지해줬으면 하는데?

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_80.english: If you're talking about material things... I haven't really thought about it.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_80.korean: 물질적인 걸 말하는 거라면… 딱히 생각해 본 적 없다.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_83.english: Sometimes, I feel that it is too good for someone like me.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_83.korean: 가끔은, 나 같은 사람에게 과분하단 생각이 들 때가 있다.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_84.english: Because everyone is following me from behind without a single complaint, even as I run forward looking only ahead.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_84.korean: 앞만 보고 달리는 나를… 모두가 불평 하나 없이 뒤에서 따라와 주고 있으니까.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_85.english: So I don't want to ask you to keep following me like you are now.
AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_85.korean: 그래서 지금처럼 계속 따라와 달라는 말은 하고 싶지 않다.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_86.english: However, if there is anything I wish for…

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_87.english: No... please forget what I just said.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_89.english: … Khan, I don't know what you're hoping for, but.

AcrossTheMilkyway3ED_90.english: You will definitely be able to achieve it.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_12.english: What's wrong with everyone? Why are you suddenly staring at me?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_12.korean: 다들 왜 그래? 갑자기 날 빤히 보고.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_13.english: Commander... You aren't thinking of going to meet our captain in that state, are you?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_13.korean: 사령관… 설마 그 상태로 우리 대장을 만나러 갈 생각은 아니겠지?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_14.english: I'm telling you, what we need isn't just a 'man,' but a 'cool. man.'
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_14.korean: 필요한 건 그냥 '남자'가 아니라 '멋. 진. 남. 자'라니까?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_16.english: Of course, I think the Commander is cool enough just the way he is... but since all of this was inspired by movies, I think some special 'direction' is needed.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_16.korean:
물론 사령관님은 있는 그대로도 충분히 멋지다고 생각하지만… 
이 모든 게 영화에서 영감을 얻은 만큼, 특별한 ‘연출’이 필요하다고 생각해요.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_20.english: Hehe. Commander, we'll turn you into a cool guy!
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_20.korean: 후후. 사령관, 우리가 멋진 남자로 만들어주지!

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_23.english: Then I'll go give Captain Khan the promise to meet.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_23.korean: 그럼 저는 칸 대장님께 만나자는 약속을 전달하고 올게요~

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_24.english: Hehehe, it looks like there will be tons of cool videos today~
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_24.korean: 우흐흐, 오늘은 멋진 영상이 잔뜩 나오겠네요~

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_25.english: (Hmm... To think the Commander called me suddenly.)

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_26.english: (Could it be because of our last conversation?)

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_28.english: Is that Kheshig? What's going on—

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_29.english: Um… excuse me for a moment…!

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_30.english: Wait… Kheshig? Why are you suddenly hugging me—
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_30.korean: 잠깐… 케시크? 왜 갑자기 날 껴안는—

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_32.english: Alright! Kheshig is holding him now, so we're taking him away just like this!
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_32.korean: 좋아! 케시크가 붙잡고 있는 지금, 이대로 연행한다!

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_36.english: You guys!? What are you doing!?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_37.english: After getting caught up in a commotion with the Horde members, I arrived at the meeting place having been "reformed" into a "cool guy."
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_37.korean: - 호드 멤버들에게 한바탕 휘말린 끝에, ‘멋진 남자’로 개조(?)당한 나는 약속 장소에 도착했다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_38.english: Over the street where neon signs spread and flowed, it felt as if I could hear the sound of the city's heart beating rapidly.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_38.korean: - 네온사인이 번져 흐르는 거리 위로, 도시의 심장이 빠르게 뛰는 소리가 들리는 듯했다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_39.english: Unlike the familiar scenery of the base, the city at night here has a somewhat excited look, as if something is about to happen at any moment.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_39.korean: - 낯익은 기지의 풍경과 달리 여기, 밤의 도시는 금방이라도 무슨 일이 벌어질 것처럼 어딘가 설레는 얼굴을 하고 있다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_40.english: In the middle of that light, a sports car is growling on the road as if it is about to tear through the night and speed off at any moment.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_40.korean: - 그 빛의 한가운데, 스포츠카 한 대가 당장이라도 밤을 찢고 달려나갈 듯 도로 위에서 으르렁거리고 있다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_42.english: - With a relaxed, confident, and unwavering 'gaze of speed' even in a glamorous dress
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_42.korean: - 화려한 드레스 차림에도 느긋하고, 자신감 있고, 한 치도 흐트러짐 없는 ‘신속의 눈빛’으로

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_43.english: There is a fiancée sitting on a car, waiting for a handsome man to welcome her.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_43.korean: - 차 위에 앉아 자신을 맞이해줄 멋진 남자를 기다리는 피앙세가 있다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_44.english: … You’re here, Commander. You’re earlier than scheduled. I didn’t expect you to come see my fiancée in such a hurry.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_44.korean:
…왔군, 사령관.​
예정보다 빠르군. 이 피앙세를 이렇게 서둘러 만나러 올 줄은 몰랐다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_45.english: What do you think? Me, who used to run around covered in desert dust, standing next to a car in a dress like this… doesn't it feel quite unfamiliar?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_45.korean:
어떤가?​
사막 먼지를 뒤집어쓰고 뛰어다니던 내가, 이런 드레스 차림으로 차 옆에 서 있으니…​
꽤 낯설지 않나?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_46.english: This car, this dress, this place... these weren't prepared lightly, were they? I can tell without any explanation that they put thought into it for me.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_46.korean:
이 차도, 이 드레스도, 이 장소도…​
하나하나 가볍게 준비된 건 아니겠지.​
나를 위해 신경 썼다는 것 정도는, 설명하지 않아도 알 수 있다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_47.english: The old me would have definitely said something like this: “We should be more thorough with battlefield preparations; is there really a need to waste energy on this?” … Now, it is difficult to readily bring myself to say those words.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_47.korean:
예전의 나라면, 분명 이렇게 말했을 거다.​
“전장 준비나 더 철저히 하지, 이런 데 힘을 쓸 필요가 있나.”​
…지금은 그 말을, 선뜻 꺼내기 어렵군.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_48.english: Looking into that gaze... if this is the 'Khan of Swiftness' the Commander desired... then standing here like this, living up to those expectations, is quite to my liking.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_48.korean:
그 눈빛을 보고 있으니 말이지.​
사령관이 바란 ‘신속의 칸’의 모습이 이런 거라면…​
그 기대에 맞춰 이렇게 서 있는 이 모습도, 꽤 마음에 드는군.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_49.english: The surrounding lights, at one time, seemed like nothing but coordinates and targets. Markers for calculating where the enemy was and where to advance.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_49.korean:
주위의 불빛들, 한때는 그저 좌표와 목표물로만 보였다.​
어디에 적이 있고, 어디로 진격해야 할지 계산하는 표시들로 말이지.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_50.english: But just for today… I want to get intoxicated by the night view of the city we defended. Because it is a precious night where I can be solely with the Commander, without any missions or briefings.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_50.korean:
하지만 오늘만큼은…​
우리가 지켜낸 도시의 야경에 취하고 싶군.​
그 어떤 임무도 브리핑도 없이, 오로지 사령관과 함께 할 수 있는 소중한 밤이니까.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_51.english: Commander, I was always obsessed with proving myself through speed and maneuverability. Moving faster than anyone else and arriving first... I believed that was my role.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_51.korean:
사령관, 나는 늘 속도와 기동으로 나를 증명하는 데 혈안이었다.​
누구보다 빨리 움직이고, 먼저 도착하는 것…​
그게 내 역할이라고 믿었지.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_52.english: But stopping leisurely and looking at the same scenery side by side with you… it was more comforting than I expected. It’s not that I’m falling behind; it’s just that the method has changed.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_52.korean:
하지만 느긋하게 멈춰 서서, 그대와 나란히 같은 풍경을 보는 것도…​
생각이상으로 마음이 편안하더군.​
뒤쳐지는 게 아니라, 방법이 바뀐 것뿐이겠지.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_53.english: Hehe, Commander. You don't have to hold on like that; this fiancée won't run away. Whether on the battlefield or right here... my body already remembers how to stand by your side.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_53.korean:
후후, 사령관. 그렇게 붙잡지 않아도 이 피앙세는 도망가지 않는다.​
전장에서도, 이 자리에서도... 이미 그대 곁에 서는 법을 몸이 기억하고 있으니까.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_54.english: So, you can think of this time today as a private straight road kept clear from beginning to end exclusively for the commander.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_54.korean: 그러니 오늘 이 시간은, 처음부터 끝까지 사령관만을 위해 비워 둔 전용 직선도로라고 생각하면 된다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_55.english: If true peace ever comes, I want to stand by your side then too, gazing at the night view together. Not as commander and subordinate… but as your fiancée.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_55.korean:
언젠가 진짜로 평화가 찾아온다면,​
그때도 그대 옆에 서서, 함께 야경을 바라보고 싶다.​
사령관과 부하의 관계가 아니라… 그대의 피앙세로서 말이다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_56.english: On the battlefield, I always ran forward without looking back... but at this moment, the fact that I can stand by your side like this is enough.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_56.korean:
전장에선 언제나 앞만 보고 달렸지만…​
지금 이 순간만큼은, 그대 곁에 이렇게 서 있을 수 있다는 사실만으로도 충분하군.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_57.english: So remember this night well, Commander. This car, the night view, and even the fiancé standing by your side like this... Today, I will stand still for you from beginning to end. Speed ​​up as much as you want, Commander.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_57.korean:
그러니 이 밤을 잘 기억해 둬라, 사령관.​
이 차와 야경, 그리고 그대 곁에 이렇게 서 있는 피앙세까지…​
오늘의 나는, 처음부터 끝까지 그대를 위해 멈춰 서 있을테니까.​
원하는 만큼 마음껏 속력을 내라, 사령관.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_58.english: The next day, dragging my stiff body out—perhaps because I had run too much the night before—I happened to run into Khan.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_58.korean: - 다음 날, 어젯밤에 너무 달렸던 탓인지 뻐근한 몸을 이끌고 나오다가 우연히 칸과 마주쳤다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_6.english: It seems best to just put them to sleep for now.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_6.korean: 지금은 그냥 재우는 게 좋아 보인다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_60.english: We were speeding yesterday... How are you feeling?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_61.english: Hehe. I'm the one who told you to go as fast as you want.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_61.korean: 후후. 마음껏 속력을 내라고 말한 건 내 쪽이다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_62.english: This much is not a problem, so you don't need to worry.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_62.korean: 이 정도는 문제 없으니 걱정하지 않아도 된다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_64.english: I heard everyone is taking the day off today.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_65.english: I plan to express my gratitude separately later.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_65.korean: 나중에 따로 고맙다는 말을 전하려고 한다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_66.english: Of course… aside from that, I do plan to give them a stern talking-to for dragging me along by force.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_66.korean: 물론… 그것과는 별개로, 강제로 날 끌고 간 건 따끔하게 한 마디 할 생각이지만.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_67.english: Haha, everyone will definitely be happy.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_71.english: Now that our movie has come to a great close, I’d like to hear your thoughts.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_71.korean: 이제 우리의 영화가 절찬리 막을 내렸으니 네 소감을 들어보고 싶어.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_72.english: Khan, was there something you really wanted among the things the Horde guys and I prepared...?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_72.korean: 칸은 호드 녀석들과 내가 준비한 것들 중에… 정말 원하는 게 있었어?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_73.english: Hmm? What does that mean? Wasn't the Commander supposed to have prepared all of this alone?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_73.korean: 흠? 무슨 뜻이지? 이 모든 게 사령관 홀로 준비한 게 아니었나?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_74.english: It seems my explanation wasn't enough... The truth is—

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_75.english: … I definitely said that back then after watching the movie.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_76.english: Hehe. So that's why you prepared this.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_76.korean: 후후. 그래서 이런 준비를 한 거였나.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_77.english: To start with the conclusion, the reason I said it was 'cool' back then was not because of the dress or the sports car.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_77.korean: 결론부터 말하자면, 그때 내가 '멋지다'라고 한 이유는 드레스나 스포츠카 때문이 아니다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_78.english: So, what was it that was cool about Khan?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_78.korean: 그럼 어떤 부분이 칸에게 멋졌던 거야?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_79.english: Do you want to hear it?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_8.english: I asked Warden Lumberjane to finish it for me.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_80.english: Yeah. I'd like you to let me know.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_82.english: In that last scene… I thought the way the two of them looked was cool.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_82.korean: 그 마지막 장면에서… 두 사람이 보여준 모습이 멋지다고 생각했다.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_83.english: If it's two people... the male and female protagonists in a movie?
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_83.korean: 두 사람이면... 영화 속 남주인공이랑 여주인공?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_85.english: At first, the two of them didn't get along and kept missing each other.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_85.korean: 처음에는 호흡도 맞지 않고, 서로 계속 어긋나던 두 사람이었지.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_86.english: But in the end… they moved forward at the same speed with perfect teamwork.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_86.korean: 그런데 결국 마지막에는… 완벽한 팀플레이로 같은 속도로 나아가더군.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_88.english: Maybe… I might have wanted to be like the main characters.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_88.korean: 어쩌면… 나는 그 주인공들처럼 되고 싶었던 걸지도 모르겠군.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_9.english: True to his title as the Director, his work processing speed was incredible!
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_9.korean: 과연 소장답게 엄청난 일 처리 속도였어!

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_90.english: No… you already achieved it, didn’t you?

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_91.english: If there is someone moving forward at the same pace as you, it is right beside me like this.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_91.korean: 너와 같은 속도로 나아갈 사람이라면, 이렇게 바로 옆에 있으니까.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_92.english: Not just me… everyone will move forward with Khan.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_92.korean: 나뿐만 아니라… 모두가 칸과 함께 나아갈 거야.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_94.english: Hahaha, I see. You're right, Commander.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_95.english: The lonely wolf who always roamed the battlefield alone…
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_95.korean: 늘 혼자 전장을 누비던 고독한 늑대가…

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_96.english: So, before I knew it, I had got what I wanted.
AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_96.korean: 어느새 원하던 걸 손에 쥔 셈인가.

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_97.english: Thank you, Commander. For coming to my side…

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_98.english: I will always be a fiancée,

AcrossTheMilkyway4ED_99.english: I will move forward at the same speed as you.

BridalClass1-1ED_1.english: Alright, everyone. Attention. Today we have a special guest as our substitute teacher.
BridalClass1-1ED_1.korean: 자, 여러분. 주목. 오늘은 특별한 손님을 일일 교사로 모셨습니다.

BridalClass1-1ED_100.english: What kind of suggestion is it, sister?

BridalClass1-1ED_101.english: Taking care of the master is important, but someday, won’t we all become the land for the master’s seeds?
BridalClass1-1ED_101.korean:
주인님의 시중을 드는 것도 중요하지만,
언젠가 우리 모두 주인님의 씨앗을 위한 토지가 되지 않겠니.

BridalClass1-1ED_102.english: I feel like I should start gradually improving my skills in cooking, housework, and parenting from now on.
BridalClass1-1ED_102.korean:
지금부터라도 차근차근 요리나 가사, 양육 같은 부분에서도 
개인별 능력치를 발전시켜야겠다는 생각이 들어.

BridalClass1-1ED_103.english: Before the destruction, humans treated us like slaves…
BridalClass1-1ED_103.korean: 멸망 전 인간님들은 우릴 노예처럼 부렸지만…

BridalClass1-1ED_104.english: Since Master sees us as equals, shouldn't we act as wise wives in many ways, just like Master?
BridalClass1-1ED_104.korean:
주인님께서는 우릴 동등하게 봐주고 계시니,
더욱이 여러 부분에서 주인님 만큼 현명한 아내의 역할을 해야 하지 않겠니?

BridalClass1-1ED_105.english: Hmm… I kind of understand what you’re saying.
BridalClass1-1ED_105.korean: 으음… 어떤 말씀을 하시는 건지 잘 알겠어요.

BridalClass1-1ED_106.english: You mean the ability to have meals even when Sowan isn’t around… and to raise the commander’s and our child even when Maria isn’t around, right?
BridalClass1-1ED_106.korean:
소완 님이 계시지 않아도 식사를 할 수 있고… 마리아 님이 
계시지 않아도 주인님과 저희의 아이를 키울 수 있는 능력 말씀이시죠?

BridalClass1-1ED_107.english: Yeah, that's right. If we learn and practice in advance, won't our kids also grow up straight and in a good way and do great things?
BridalClass1-1ED_107.korean:
그래 맞아. 우리가 미리 배우고 익혀야, 우리의 아이들도
올곧고 좋은 방향으로 자라나 큰일을 하지 않겠니.

BridalClass1-1ED_108.english: Unlike the humans before the destruction, we have to pass on an environment imbued with the master's good beliefs.
BridalClass1-1ED_108.korean: 멸망 전 인간님들과 다르게, 주인님의 선한 신념이 깃든 환경을 물려줘야지.

BridalClass1-1ED_109.english: I got it, sis. So… how are you thinking of suggesting it?
BridalClass1-1ED_109.korean: 이해했어요 언니. 그래서… 어떻게 건의할 생각이세요?

BridalClass1-1ED_11.english: …Emily? Why are you dangerously climbing onto the desk? And why are you patting your stomach?
BridalClass1-1ED_11.korean:
…에밀리 양? 위험하게 왜 책상 위로 올라가시는 거죠?
그리고 왜 배를 두드리시는 거죠?

BridalClass1-1ED_110.english: Right now, it's tough to provide professional lessons to all the Orca Resistance members…
BridalClass1-1ED_110.korean: 지금 당장 모든 오르카 저항군 대원 분들께 전문적인 수업을 제공하기 어려우니...

BridalClass1-1ED_111.english: Through the test, we are trying to conduct an evaluation that prioritizes those who have qualifications.
BridalClass1-1ED_111.korean: 시험을 통해, 자질을 가진 분들을 우선적으로 가려내는 평가를 진행하려고 해.

BridalClass1-1ED_112.english: If we gather data through them, we’ll definitely be able to create a good curriculum.
BridalClass1-1ED_112.korean: 그분들을 통해 데이터를 쌓게 된다면, 분명 좋은 커리큘럼을 개설할 수 있을 거야.

BridalClass1-1ED_113.english: Can't we teach the winners more and later make them teachers for the 'Perfect Bride' class?
BridalClass1-1ED_113.korean: 우승자 분들을 더 가르쳐 훗날 '완벽한 신부' 수업의 교사로 삼을 수 있지 않을까?

BridalClass1-1ED_114.english: That's a really good idea, Labiata sister!

BridalClass1-1ED_115.english: So… what the women humans used to get before the destruction…
BridalClass1-1ED_115.korean: 그러니까… 멸망 전 여성 인간님들이 받던…

BridalClass1-1ED_116.english: Is it like a new edition of Shin Bu Soup?
BridalClass1-1ED_116.korean: 신. 부. 수. 업의 신개정판 같은 건가요?

BridalClass1-1ED_117.english: Yeah. I'll soon suggest to Master that they hold a tournament too, so I hope you all do your best as battle maids closest to him.
BridalClass1-1ED_117.korean:
그래. 주인님께도 조만간 대회를 여는 걸 권할 테니, 너희들도 
주인님을 가장 옆에서 보필하는 배틀메이드로써 열심히 해주길 바라.

BridalClass1-1ED_119.english: - After spending nights one by one with the Orca crew, somehow my work started piling up little by little…
BridalClass1-1ED_119.korean: - 오르카 대원들과 차례로 밤을 보내다 보니, 언젠가부터 조금씩 일이 밀리기 시작했다…

BridalClass1-1ED_12.english: Chubby. Endless humans will come out from here and kill you all. Chubby.
BridalClass1-1ED_12.korean: 통통. 여기에서 끝없는 인간이 나와서 너희들을 모두 죽일 거다. 통통.

BridalClass1-1ED_120.english: - Honestly, I'm secretly coming in on weekends to deal with the backlog without Alpha knowing… but I still can't shake off this feeling of unease.
BridalClass1-1ED_120.korean:
- 솔직히 밀린 일은 알파 몰래 주말에 출근해서 
남몰래 처리하고 있지만… 마음의 불편함은 가시질 않는다.

BridalClass1-1ED_123.english: Why are you staring at me like that, master?

BridalClass1-1ED_124.english: ...If you're that curious, should I even lift up my skirt for you?

BridalClass1-1ED_125.english: Well, no… that's not it… I'm sure I changed the sheets yesterday too…
BridalClass1-1ED_125.korean: 그, 아니… 그게 아니라… 분명 어제도 시트를 갈았을 텐데…

BridalClass1-1ED_126.english: Sorry for saying I’ll come again.

BridalClass1-1ED_128.english: You look tired today; do you want me to bring you some coffee?

BridalClass1-1ED_129.english: You actually look more tired than I do, Vanilla. I'll tell Constantia to take your work off your plate today.
BridalClass1-1ED_129.korean:
나보단 오히려 바닐라 네가 피곤해보이는걸. 
내가 콘스탄챠한테 말해서 오늘 네 업무를 빼줄게.

BridalClass1-1ED_132.english: Um... if I really look like I'm having a hard time.

BridalClass1-1ED_134.english: - At Vanilla's cute, playful grumbling, I spread my arms with a satisfied smile, and just as Vanilla scampered over and leaned against me, I was about to nuzzle my lips against her soft forehead.
BridalClass1-1ED_134.korean:
- 바닐라의 애교 섞인 투덜거림에 나는 흐뭇하게 팔을 벌렸고,
쪼르르 다가와 내게 안기는 바닐라의 보드라운 이마에 입술을 비비려는 순간이었다.

BridalClass1-1ED_135.english: Master, is it okay if I come in?

BridalClass1-1ED_137.english:
- After Vanilla quickly pulled away from me, she cleared her throat.  
After the door opened, Labiata, who came in, smiled at Vanilla.
BridalClass1-1ED_137.korean:
- 바닐라가 황급히 내게서 떨어진 후, 목소리를 가다듬었다.
문이 열린 후, 안으로 들어 온 라비아타는 바닐라에게 웃어보였다.

BridalClass1-1ED_138.english: Master, I stopped by for a bit because I have a suggestion.
BridalClass1-1ED_138.korean: 주인님, 건의드릴 게 있어 잠시 들렀습니다.

BridalClass1-1ED_14.english: "Emily, have Beast Hunter come to my office soon. Just because you’re patting your belly doesn’t mean you’re going to have a baby."
BridalClass1-1ED_14.korean:
에밀리 양, 조만간 비스트헌터 양과 함께 제 집무실로 오도록 해요.
배를 통통 두드린다고 해서 아이가 생기는 건 아니랍니다.

BridalClass1-1ED_140.english: Of course, Master loves all of us, and the only way we can properly show our feelings to Master is…
BridalClass1-1ED_140.korean:
주인님은 물론 저희 모두를 사랑하시고, 저희도 주인님께 
제대로 표현할 수 있는 방법이 그것 뿐이라…

BridalClass1-1ED_141.english: I know you're sleeping with a lot of the crew members every day.
BridalClass1-1ED_141.korean: 많은 대원 분들과 매일 동침하고 계신 걸 알고 있어요.

BridalClass1-1ED_143.english: From now on, as much as you and the resistance members can become the origin of the new humans…
BridalClass1-1ED_143.korean: 앞으로, 주인님과 저항군 분들이 신인류의 기원이 될 수 있는 만큼…

BridalClass1-1ED_144.english: All of you guys aren’t just war machines fighting against the Iron Bugs, or just staying around to serve the Master at night…
BridalClass1-1ED_144.korean:
모든 대원 분들은 단순히 철충과 전투를 하는 전쟁 병기, 
혹은 주인님의 밤시중 담당에서 머무르는 게 아니라…

BridalClass1-1ED_145.english: I felt like I needed the education and culture that a true wife of my master and the first mother of the new human race should have.
BridalClass1-1ED_145.korean: 주인님의 진정한 아내이자, 신인류의 첫 어머니로써 갖춰야 할 교육과 교양이 필요하다고 느껴졌어요.

BridalClass1-1ED_146.english: "At Labiata's serious words, I glanced to the side and saw Vanilla, her face bright red even as she was tidying up my bedding, quietly repeating 'Mom.'"
BridalClass1-1ED_146.korean:
- 라비아타의 진지한 말에 힐끔, 옆을 보자, 내 이부자리를 정리하면서도
얼굴이 새빨개 진 채, '엄마'라고 되뇌이는 바닐라를 보았다.

BridalClass1-1ED_148.english: Yes, yes!! Uh, sister!! You're right!!
BridalClass1-1ED_148.korean: 네, 네!! 어, 언니!! 언니 말씀이 맞아요!!

BridalClass1-1ED_149.english: So, recently I've been thinking about holding a contest to evaluate 'the virtues of a wife,' pick the members who pass with excellent results, and then hold a 'bride class' to give lectures to the members.
BridalClass1-1ED_149.korean:
그래서, 요 근래 제가 생각해 온 '아내의 덕목'을 평가하는 대회를 열어,
우수한 성적으로 통과한 대원 분들을 뽑아, '신부 수업'을 열어, 대원 분들께 강의할 생각이에요.

BridalClass1-1ED_15.english: Next… um, yeah. Neodim over there who raised her hand, would you like to speak?
BridalClass1-1ED_15.korean: 다음으론… 음, 그래. 저기 손을 든 네오딤 양이 말씀해 보시겠어요?

BridalClass1-1ED_151.english: - I hadn’t really thought much about culture and education, so I didn’t really care.
BridalClass1-1ED_151.korean: - 그간 교양과 교육에 대해 크게 생각해 본 적 없기에 아무렇지 않게 여겼다.

BridalClass1-1ED_152.english: - Even for the sake of a healthy understanding of sexuality and proper education for child bioids…
BridalClass1-1ED_152.korean: - 아동 바이오로이드의 건전한 성 인식과 올바른 교육을 위해서라도…

BridalClass1-1ED_153.english: - And, in order to devote yourself even more faithfully to the commander's own duties!
BridalClass1-1ED_153.korean: - 그리고, 사령관 본연의 업무에 더욱 충실히 일하기 위해서라도!

BridalClass1-1ED_155.english: Alright, leave the report on my desk. I'll take a good look at it.
BridalClass1-1ED_155.korean: 좋아, 보고서는 내 책상 위에 올려 둬. 적극적으로 검토해 볼게.

BridalClass1-1ED_157.english: Alright, Vanilla. Shall we tidy up the bedding together today?
BridalClass1-1ED_157.korean: 자, 바닐라. 오늘은 나랑 같이 이부자리를 정리할까?

BridalClass1-1ED_158.english: Ah… I-I'm okay, Labiata sister! You must be busy…
BridalClass1-1ED_158.korean: 아앗… 괘, 괜찮아요, 라비아타 언니! 바쁘실텐데…

BridalClass1-1ED_159.english:
Hehe, it's okay. Uccha, then shall we go to the laundry room together?  
Ladies, I folded all the laundry that was just hung out this time.
BridalClass1-1ED_159.korean: 후훗, 괜찮아. 웃차, 그러면 같이 세탁실로 갈까?

BridalClass1-1ED_16.english: Brownie told me that if you get the commander drunk, you might end up with a baby.
BridalClass1-1ED_16.korean: 사령관한테 술을 먹이면 아기가 생길 수도 있다고 브라우니가 알려줬어.

BridalClass1-1ED_160.english: - After Labiata and Vanilla organized the sheets, I carefully went through Raviata's plan.
BridalClass1-1ED_160.korean:
- 라비아타와 바닐라가 시트를 정리해 나간 후,
나는 라비아타의 기획안을 차근히 읽어보았다.

BridalClass1-1ED_162.english: "In the past, humans probably lived comfortably using bioids to suit their convenience, but if humanity is rebuilt, just as much as they wish for an equal world without hierarchy…"
BridalClass1-1ED_162.korean:
- 예전에야 인간들은 편의에 맞춰 바이오로이드들을 부리며 편히 살았겠지만,
인류가 재건된다면 위아래가 없는 평등한 세상을 바라는 만큼…

BridalClass1-1ED_163.english: - It seemed necessary to learn the proper qualities of a family.
BridalClass1-1ED_163.korean: - 제대로 된 가정의 소양을 배우는 것이 필요해 보였다.

BridalClass1-1ED_164.english: Hmm… I read the proposal for the Labiata campaign that you sent me.
BridalClass1-1ED_164.korean: 흐음… 주인님께서 보내주신 라비아타 통령의 기획안은 잘 읽었어요.

BridalClass1-1ED_165.english: Definitely, I could relate to the president's concerns too.

BridalClass1-1ED_166.english: Still, you know, the whole survival format thing is kind of worrying…
BridalClass1-1ED_166.korean: 그래도 말이지 서바이벌 형식이라는 게 마음에 걸리네…

BridalClass1-1ED_167.english: I can understand that the master would sympathize with the disappointment of someone who gets eliminated.
BridalClass1-1ED_167.korean: 탈락하고 실망할 분의 상심을 주인님께서 헤아리시는 것도 이해가 가요.

BridalClass1-1ED_168.english: But since it's the first event that will be responsible for future education, it has to be strict.
BridalClass1-1ED_168.korean: 하지만 앞으로의 교육을 책임질 첫 행사인 만큼 엄격해야 하죠.

BridalClass1-1ED_169.english: Because being a mother is something so great that words can't fully describe.
BridalClass1-1ED_169.korean: 어머니란 말로 다 할 수 없을 만큼 위대한 것이니까요.

BridalClass1-1ED_17.english: No. If you pat the commander, the commander’s face turns red.
BridalClass1-1ED_17.korean: 아니야. 사령관한테 탁탁 두드리면 사령관, 얼굴 빨개져.

BridalClass1-1ED_171.english: Let's have the president take charge of being the main judge for the first competition.
BridalClass1-1ED_171.korean: 첫 대회의 메인 심사위원은 통령이 맡아 진행하는 걸로 하시지요.

BridalClass1-1ED_172.english: Is it okay if Alpha leaves?

BridalClass1-1ED_174.english: President Labiata is kind of like the mother of all bioroids.
BridalClass1-1ED_174.korean: 라비아타 통령은 모든 바이오로이드의 어머니와도 같은 위치에 계시니까요.

BridalClass1-1ED_175.english: Lyrics, combat... and necessary know-how, you're all a step ahead of me.
BridalClass1-1ED_175.korean: 가사와 전투... 그리고 필수 소양 모두, 저보다 한 수 위에 있죠.

BridalClass1-1ED_176.english: Since you're almost perfect, I think it's right to leave this exam entirely to you.
BridalClass1-1ED_176.korean: 완벽에 가까우신 만큼, 이번 시험은 통령에게 모두 맡기는 것이 옳다고 판단합니다.

BridalClass1-1ED_177.english: Now that you say that, I guess I should leave it to Labiata too.

BridalClass1-1ED_178.english: Let's have Labiata handle the whole competition this time, and I'll support you if you need anything.
BridalClass1-1ED_178.korean: 이번 대회는 라비아타가 전부 맡는 걸로 하고, 필요한 게 있으면 내가 지원해줄게.

BridalClass1-1ED_179.english: Help Labiata get ready for the competition.
BridalClass1-1ED_179.korean: 라비아타를 도와 대회를 잘 준비해 줘.

BridalClass1-1ED_180.english: Yes, don't worry, Master. I'll do that.
BridalClass1-1ED_180.korean: 네, 걱정 마세요 주인님. 그렇게 하겠어요.

BridalClass1-1ED_2.english: Let's give a round of applause to President Labiata, who took time out of their busy schedule to come and evaluate your studies!
BridalClass1-1ED_2.korean:
바쁜 와중에도 시간을 내어 여러분의 학업을 평가하러 오신 
라비아타 통령을 박수로 맞이해 주세요!

BridalClass1-1ED_20.english: Quiet. Both of you, please take a seat.
BridalClass1-1ED_20.korean: 조용. 두 분 다 자리에 앉으세요.

BridalClass1-1ED_22.english: Wearing clothes like that isn't the right answer either, Kaen. Put your hands down.
BridalClass1-1ED_22.korean: 그런 옷을 입는 것도 정답이 아니에요, 카엔 양. 손 내리세요.

BridalClass1-1ED_25.english: What I’ve prioritized the most in the education I’ve provided to you all so far…
BridalClass1-1ED_25.korean: 그동안 여러분께 제공할 교육에 있어서 최우선으로 여겼던 건…

BridalClass1-1ED_26.english: It was about how to survive iron bugs and how to deal with unexpected situations.
BridalClass1-1ED_26.korean: 철충으로부터 살아남는 법과, 돌발 상황 대처 방안이었어요.

BridalClass1-1ED_27.english: Back when they were setting up the initial education curriculum, there wasn’t really enough capacity to offer general education classes separately…
BridalClass1-1ED_27.korean: 초창기 교육 커리큘럼을 개설할 당시에 교양 수업을 따로 개설할 여력이 녹록지 않았지만...

BridalClass1-1ED_28.english: If Orca continues to steadily strengthen its power like now, the day will soon come when we can rebuild humanity together with you, master.
BridalClass1-1ED_28.korean:
지금처럼 순조롭게 오르카가 세력을 굳건히 다져가다 보면
주인님과 함께 인류 재건을 할 날이 머지않아 오게 될 테죠.

BridalClass1-1ED_29.english: We’ll need a new curriculum, if only to safely rebuild humanity.
BridalClass1-1ED_29.korean: 안전하게 인류를 재건하기 위해서라도 새로운 커리큘럼이 필요하겠어요.

BridalClass1-1ED_3.english: Nice to meet you all. Thanks also to Alexandra for the warm welcome.
BridalClass1-1ED_3.korean: 반가워요, 여러분. 환대를 배풀어주신 알렉산드라 님께도 감사드립니다.

BridalClass1-1ED_30.english: You can tell if you watch the video with the Arsenal captain and the commander together. Don't treat me like an idiot.
BridalClass1-1ED_30.korean: 아스널 대장이랑 사령관이 같이 찍은 비디오 보면 알 수 있어. 바보 취급 하지 마.

BridalClass1-1ED_32.english: I'll show it to Kaen later after it's done.

BridalClass1-1ED_33.english: … It's deadly. I'll see it too.

BridalClass1-1ED_35.english: ...I guess I'll have to call Talon feather over separately soon and have a training session.
BridalClass1-1ED_35.korean: ...조만간 탈론페더 양도 따로 불러 훈육 시간을 가져야겠네요.

BridalClass1-1ED_37.english: ...Yes, that's fine. What are you curious about?

BridalClass1-1ED_38.english: Lacey said that in the old days, humans used to take special classes to become brides.
BridalClass1-1ED_38.korean:
레이시 언니가 그러는데, 옛날 인류는
신부가 되기 위해 특별한 수업을 듣기도 했대.

BridalClass1-1ED_39.english: ...Why don't we have any special classes?
BridalClass1-1ED_39.korean: …우린 왜 특별한 수업을 안 하는 거야?

BridalClass1-1ED_4.english: The reason I’m standing at the podium myself today is to check how hard all of you are studying.
BridalClass1-1ED_4.korean: 오늘 제가 직접 교탁에 선 이유는 여러분들이 얼마나 열심히 공부하고 있는지 점검을 하기 위해서예요.

BridalClass1-1ED_40.english: If I take a special class, can I become the commander's bride?
BridalClass1-1ED_40.korean: 특별한 수업을 들으면 사령관의 신부 될 수 있어?

BridalClass1-1ED_41.english: My mom told me before. She said a brutal trial was waiting.
BridalClass1-1ED_41.korean: 예전에 엄마가 알려줬어. 혹독한 시련이 기다리고 있대.

BridalClass1-1ED_43.english: It's a term that refers to all kinds of curricula that developed in various forms, from the days long ago when women formally studied to modern times before its decline.
BridalClass1-1ED_43.korean: 먼 옛날, 여성들이 격식을 갖춰 배우던 시절부터 멸망 전 현대까지 여러 형태로 발전한 커리큘럼을 아울러 말하는 단어군요.

BridalClass1-1ED_44.english: There have been only a few times it was used properly, but I remember that some of the sisters still have basic training data left to match human tastes.
BridalClass1-1ED_44.korean: 제대로 쓰인 적은 손에 꼽을 정도이지만, 인간님들의 취향에 맞춰 몇몇의 자매들에게는 기본 학습 데이터가 남아 있는 걸 기억해요.

BridalClass1-1ED_45.english: That's a good question. Right now, the only human left on Earth is you, so you could even say that it's common sense that the Orca resistance would definitely require.
BridalClass1-1ED_45.korean:
좋은 질문이네요. 지금 지구에 남은 인간 님은 오직 주인님 한 분이니,
오르카 저항군이라면 필수적으로 요구될 상식이라고 해도 과언이 아니겠어요.

BridalClass1-1ED_46.english: Commander probably doesn't know what a 'perfect bride' is either.
BridalClass1-1ED_46.korean: 사령관님께서도 '완벽한 신부'란 무엇인지 알고 계시지 않을 테니까요.

BridalClass1-1ED_47.english: I think it's a curriculum that's really necessary for a bright future.
BridalClass1-1ED_47.korean: 밝은 미래를 위해 꼭 필요한 커리큘럼이라고 생각되네요.

BridalClass1-1ED_48.english: ...If I attend class, can I become the perfect bride the commander likes?
BridalClass1-1ED_48.korean: …수업 들으면, 사령관이 좋아하는 완벽한 신부… 될 수 있어?

BridalClass1-1ED_49.english: Of course, to become the perfect bride... you need to refine not just matters between men and women, but also your basic manners and skills.
BridalClass1-1ED_49.korean:
당연하죠, 완벽한 신부가 되기 위해선…
남녀 사이의 일은 물론, 그 외의 기본적인 소양을 갈고닦을 필요가 있답니다.

BridalClass1-1ED_5.english: I really enjoyed your presentation. As expected, Ms. Alexandra is teaching you all diligently.
BridalClass1-1ED_5.korean: 여러분의 발표 정말 잘 들었어요. 역시 알렉산드라 선생님께서 여러분을 열심히 가르치고 계시는군요.

BridalClass1-1ED_50.english: The new generation of bioroids isn’t just machines that do simple housework…
BridalClass1-1ED_50.korean: 신인류의 바이오로이드는 단순 가사 노동을 하는 기계가 아닌…

BridalClass1-1ED_51.english: Because you also have to play the role of a teacher who passes on life's wisdom for the sake of everyone's descendants.
BridalClass1-1ED_51.korean: 여러분들의 후손을 위해 삶의 지혜를 전수하는 선생님의 역할도 수행해야 하니까요.

BridalClass1-1ED_52.english: Then I want to take bride lessons too.

BridalClass1-1ED_53.english: Right now, there's no teacher who can take charge of wedding lessons for all the resistance members.
BridalClass1-1ED_53.korean: 지금 당장은 수많은 저항군 분들의 신부 수업을 담당해 줄 수 있는 선생님은 없어요.

BridalClass1-1ED_54.english: It would be good to pick cultured people and set up a curriculum.
BridalClass1-1ED_54.korean: 소양 있는 분들을 뽑아 커리큘럼을 개설하는 게 좋겠어요.

BridalClass1-1ED_55.english: So that you all can become the perfect bride for the master… I mean, the commander too.
BridalClass1-1ED_55.korean: 여러분들도 주인님… 아니, 사령관님의 완벽한 신부가 될 수 있도록.

BridalClass1-1ED_56.english: I'll try to come up with a plan and suggest it soon.

BridalClass1-1ED_57.english: Let's wrap up today's class here. I hope you all take some time to think over the questions I gave you again~
BridalClass1-1ED_57.korean:
오늘 수업은 여기서 마칠게요. 
여러분들도 제가 드린 질문에 대해 다시 한번 잘 생각해 보길 바랄게요~

BridalClass1-1ED_58.english: Hey you girl! I really can't live with you…
BridalClass1-1ED_58.korean: 야이 가시나야! 내는 참말로 니캉 못 살긋다…

BridalClass1-1ED_59.english: What's wrong all of a sudden?

BridalClass1-1ED_60.english: Hey, I was just giving the closet a new scent experience! It’s called ‘Eau de Gym’—very exclusive.
BridalClass1-1ED_60.korean: 하이고야… 운동할 때 입은 옷을 빨지도 않고 옷장에 넣어놨으니 냄시가 안 빠진다 아이가?!

BridalClass1-1ED_62.english: The captain even liked the smell of sweat…

BridalClass1-1ED_63.english: Are you crazy, you girl?! What are we supposed to do if we’re living together?
BridalClass1-1ED_63.korean:
이 가스나가 미쳤나?! 같이 생활하는 우린 우짜라고? 싫다 안카나!
하이고 이 답답아… 니는 언제쯤 숙녀 될끼고…?!

BridalClass1-1ED_64.english: Hey, since we're on the topic, let's do one more. Why are you always doing the laundry with hot water?
BridalClass1-1ED_64.korean:
그라고, 이래 말 나온 김에 하나 더 하자.
니는 와 자꾸 뜨신 물로 빨래를 하고 앉았는기라?

BridalClass1-1ED_65.english: You have to boil it in hot water to get it clean. Why are you asking something obvious?
BridalClass1-1ED_65.korean: 뜨거운 물로 푹푹 삶아야 깨끗하지. 당연한 걸 왜 물어?

BridalClass1-1ED_66.english: Ha, I'm gonna go crazy… Don't you know my lace bra has completely shrunk because of you?! I even went out and bought super fancy underwear from Audrey to show the commander…
BridalClass1-1ED_66.korean:
하, 내 돌아삐겠다 아이가… 니 때문에 내 레이스 부라자가 확 쭐어 삔거 모르나?!
사령관님한테 보여줄라고 기껏 오드리한테 억수로 까리한 속옷도 샀고마…

BridalClass1-1ED_67.english: Can I be honest? Honestly, Hussar, it’s not like your chest is even that big.
BridalClass1-1ED_67.korean: …소신발언 해도 될까? 솔직히 후사르 너 가슴이 엄청 큰 것도 아니잖아.

BridalClass1-1ED_68.english: W-what does that have to do with anything?! Are you seriously trying to die because of me?! You messed up and won’t even admit it!
BridalClass1-1ED_68.korean:
그, 그게 대체 몬 상관인데?! 니 내한테 진짜 디질라카나?!
니가 잘못해 놓고 와 인정을 안 하는데!

BridalClass1-1ED_69.english: Oh my… seriously, even if you teach him, he can't even do the laundry properly…
BridalClass1-1ED_69.korean: 하이고 마… 가스나, 와 가르쳐 줘도 빨래 하나 제대로 못하는 기고…

BridalClass1-1ED_7.english: Basic mandatory knowledge is important, but what’s most important right now... is, after all, sex education for the future with Master, no... with the Commander.
BridalClass1-1ED_7.korean:
의무 기초 지식도 중요하지만, 지금으로써 가장 중요한 건... 역시 주인님, 
아니... 사령관님과의 미래를 위한 성교육이죠.

BridalClass1-1ED_71.english: ...As expected, the path to perfectly recreating Hachiko's meat pie is long and tough.
BridalClass1-1ED_71.korean: …역시, 하치코 씨의 완벽한 미트파이를 따라 만드는 길이란 멀고도 험난하군요.

BridalClass1-1ED_72.english: Atalanta, this thing is flashing blue light, is it really a meatpie? …
BridalClass1-1ED_72.korean: 아탈란테 님, 이거 파란 빛이 번쩍거리는데 정말 미트파이 맞아요?

BridalClass1-1ED_73.english:
I made it following the recipe Hachiko gave me… and this is what came out.  
I don’t know why the Orca folks want to put this pie in the nuclear fuel pool…
BridalClass1-1ED_73.korean:
하치코 씨가 일러준 레시피 대로 만들었는데… 이런 결과물이 나왔습니다.
오르카 분들께선 왜 이 파이를 핵연료 수조에 두고 오라 하는지 모르겠지만…

BridalClass1-1ED_74.english: Sigh… I wonder when I’ll be able to proudly show my dishes to all the Orca members and the commander…?
BridalClass1-1ED_74.korean: 하아… 언제쯤 오르카 모든 분들과 사령관께 자랑스레 음식을 선보일 수 있을까요…?

BridalClass1-1ED_75.english:
Hehe~ Since you're training hard, maybe you'll be able to do it soon?  
I don't really know how food can shine though…
BridalClass1-1ED_75.korean:
헤헤~ 열심히 단련하고 계시니 조만간 가능하지 않을까요? 
어떻게 음식이 빛을 내는 건지는 모르겠지만…

BridalClass1-1ED_76.english: By the way, Hachiko. You look happy. Did something happen?
BridalClass1-1ED_76.korean:
그나저나 하치코 씨. 기분이 좋아 보이시는군요.
무슨 일이라도 있으셨습니까?

BridalClass1-1ED_77.english: Master actually ate two plates of the mint chocolate meat pie I made.
BridalClass1-1ED_77.korean: 주인님께서 제가 만든 민트초코 미트파이를 두 접시나 드셨거든요.

BridalClass1-1ED_78.english: Since you said it was delicious, I'm going to bake one more!
BridalClass1-1ED_78.korean: 주인님이 맛있으시다고 해서, 하나 더 구우려고요!

BridalClass1-1ED_79.english: ...No way. Hachiko's mint chocolate mint pie must be really delicious... I'm jealous.
BridalClass1-1ED_79.korean: …이럴 수가. 하치코 씨의 민트초코 미트파이가 얼마나 맛있으면… 부럽습니다.

BridalClass1-1ED_8.english: In that sense, shall I ask you a question?

BridalClass1-1ED_80.english: The companion kids say they’re full after just one bite… but I like that Master always eats well!
BridalClass1-1ED_80.korean: 컴패니언 자매들은 한 입 먹고 배부르다 하는데… 주인님께선 늘 잘 드셔주셔서 좋아요!

BridalClass1-1ED_81.english: Now that I think about it, Atalanta, those food lights are flashing, and I thought if we showed them to Master, he'd like them because they're pretty and beautiful!
BridalClass1-1ED_81.korean:
그러고 보니까 아탈란테 님, 그 음식 불빛이 번쩍번쩍 거리는데
주인님께 보여드리면 예쁘고 아름다워서 좋아하실 것 같다는 생각이 들었어요!

BridalClass1-1ED_83.english: Yeah~ I've never seen a meat pie this unique before! Lilith said that if the food you make is pretty, you'll have a pretty child!
BridalClass1-1ED_83.korean:
네~ 이렇게 특이한 미트파이는 처음 봤거든요!
리리스 언니가 그러는데, 직접 만든 음식이 예쁘면 예쁜 아이를 낳는다고 했어요!

BridalClass1-1ED_87.english: Oh, Contantia. You said you weren't going to work after getting off work.
BridalClass1-1ED_87.korean: 어머, 콘스탄챠. 퇴근하면 일은 하지 않기로 했잖니.

BridalClass1-1ED_89.english: I have to put together and announce the sleeping schedule for a whole year right away…

BridalClass1-1ED_9.english: Does anyone know how to properly explain how babies are made?
BridalClass1-1ED_9.korean: 아이는 어떻게 생기는지, 제대로 설명할 수 있는 분 계시나요?

BridalClass1-1ED_90.english: From experience, it's common for the members who sleep with the master to go way over the planned time…
BridalClass1-1ED_90.korean: 경험상 주인님과 동침하는 대원 분들이 계획보다 훨씬 시간을 오버하는 경우도 잦고...

BridalClass1-1ED_91.english: It's pretty tough trying to make a schedule considering all sorts of unexpected situations.
BridalClass1-1ED_91.korean: 여러 가지 돌발 상황을 고려해서 계획표를 짜려고 하니 상당히 힘드네요.

BridalClass1-1ED_93.english: Ahh... I was really ecstatic today... Oh my God, uh, sister?! Have you already arrived?
BridalClass1-1ED_93.korean: 아아... 오늘도 정말 황홀했어… 어머나, 어, 언니?! 벌써 오셨어요?

BridalClass1-1ED_94.english: ...Haha, it looks like you genuinely came to serve your master again today.
BridalClass1-1ED_94.korean: …하하, 오늘도 진심을 다해 주인님 시중을 들고 왔나보구나.

BridalClass1-1ED_95.english: S-sorry. I only showed you my clumsy side…
BridalClass1-1ED_95.korean: 죄, 죄송해요. 칠칠지 못한 모습만 보여서…

BridalClass1-1ED_96.english: Hehe, it’s okay… You’re in your prime, and if Master was satisfied, that’s all that matters.
BridalClass1-1ED_96.korean: 우후후, 괜찮단다… 한참 왕성할 때고, 주인님도 만족하셨다면 다행이지.

BridalClass1-1ED_98.english: Sorry, guys… I should be setting a good example…

BridalClass1-1ED_99.english: I'm thinking of making a new suggestion to the master, and since we're all gathered like this, do you want to hear it?
BridalClass1-1ED_99.korean: 주인님께 새로운 건의를 할까 하는데, 마침 이렇게 모였으니 한번 들어보겠니?

BridalClass1-2ED_1.english: - [Announcement, Bride of Orca:: Guide to the Prospective Wife Competition]
BridalClass1-2ED_1.korean: - 《공고, 오르카의 신부:: 예비 아내 대결 안내》

BridalClass1-2ED_10.english: Do you know the term 'newlywed three choices'?

BridalClass1-2ED_100.english: So, would you like to say something? What do you think your child would say upon seeing that jewel with only the important parts covered?
BridalClass1-2ED_100.korean: 그럼 말씀해보시겠어요? 중요 부위만 가린 그 보석을 본 당신의 아이가 무슨 말을 할지요?

BridalClass1-2ED_103.english: Th-this is, of course, an outfit suitable for a wife's as well as a mother's maternal side.
BridalClass1-2ED_103.korean: 이, 이건 아내는 물론 어머니의 모성에 알맞은 옷이죠.

BridalClass1-2ED_106.english: Oh, right! When the baby is hungry… th-this is a functional outfit that lets you quickly give breast milk by removing the jewel...!
BridalClass1-2ED_106.korean:
오, 옳지! 아이가 배고프면… 이, 이렇게 보석을 떼서
모… 모유를 빠르게 줄 수 있는 기능성 옷이라고요!

BridalClass1-2ED_108.english: ...Even if I were a baby, being breastfed by a mom wearing clothes like this…
BridalClass1-2ED_108.korean: …내가 아기라도, 이런 옷을 입은 엄마한테 수유를 당하는 건...

BridalClass1-2ED_11.english: Before the destruction, when the male humans returned home, the female humans in these clothes said.
BridalClass1-2ED_11.korean: 멸망 전 남성 인간님들이 귀가하시거든 이런 옷을 입은 여성 인간님들이 말했지.

BridalClass1-2ED_111.english: Did you see that? An untidy chest. That outfit doesn't match the word 'classy' at all.
BridalClass1-2ED_111.korean: 보셨지요? 단정하지 못한 가슴. 그 옷은 품격이란 말에 전혀 어울리지 않는 옷이에요.

BridalClass1-2ED_112.english: …Challenger Yang. So, do you think that outfit matches your wife's dignity?
BridalClass1-2ED_112.korean: …도전자 양. 그럼 그 옷은 아내의 품격에 맞는 옷이라고 생각하시나요?

BridalClass1-2ED_114.english: I've heard that newlyweds can get passionate just by looking into each other's eyes.
BridalClass1-2ED_114.korean: 신혼부부는 서로 눈만 마주쳐도 불타오르는 법이라고 들었어요.

BridalClass1-2ED_115.english: I pride this outfit on being one that adds fuel to the flames and increases the birth rate of the new humans.
BridalClass1-2ED_115.korean: 이 옷은 그 불길에 장작을 더하는 옷으로, 신인류의 출산율을 올리는 옷이라고 자부합니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_116.english: You could say it's clothes that really fit the 'dignity of a wife'.
BridalClass1-2ED_116.korean: 가히, '아내의 품격'에 맞는 옷이라 할 수 있죠.

BridalClass1-2ED_119.english: And this outfit is a homely one that you can wear to play with the kids even on Halloween!
BridalClass1-2ED_119.korean: 그리고 이 옷은 할로윈 때도 아이들과 같이 놀 수 있는 가정적인 옷이랍니다!

BridalClass1-2ED_12.english: Do you want to take a bath first? Or eat first? Or…

BridalClass1-2ED_120.english: I've always wondered… did kids just wear stuff like this and run around collecting candy even before the apocalypse…?
BridalClass1-2ED_120.korean: 늘 궁금했는데… 혹시 멸망 전 아이들도 이런 것만 걸치고 사탕을 얻으러 돌아다녔던 것이냐…?

BridalClass1-2ED_121.english: ...If you put clothes like that on me, I would never go outside…
BridalClass1-2ED_121.korean: …짐한테 저런 옷을 입힌다면 절대로 밖을 돌아다니지 않을 것이니라...

BridalClass1-2ED_125.english: If you're a true wife, you should be able to keep your figure even when wearing bold styles like this.
BridalClass1-2ED_125.korean: 진정한 아내라면, 이런 과감한 스타일의 옷을 입고도 라인을 유지해야 하는 법이에요.

BridalClass1-2ED_126.english: Just by pulling this string, you can spend the night with Mr. right away… Isn't this exactly what a wife's charm is?
BridalClass1-2ED_126.korean: 이렇게 끈만 당기면, 바로 미스터와 밤을 보낼 수 있는 옷… 이게 바로 와이프의 소양 아닐까?

BridalClass1-2ED_127.english: The sisters really have no idea… If you put a leash on like this, you can even have a cozy walk with your husband.
BridalClass1-2ED_127.korean:
시스터들은 정말 몰라도 한참 몰라…
이렇게 목줄을 달고 있으면, 허즈밴드와 오붓한 산책도 할 수 있다고.

BridalClass1-2ED_129.english: I feel this way every time I see it…

BridalClass1-2ED_130.english: I heard from Andvari that now the supplies are steadily sufficient…
BridalClass1-2ED_130.korean: 안드바리한테 듣기론 이젠 보급품이 안정적으로 넉넉하다는데…

BridalClass1-2ED_131.english: ...Why, did it just remind you of that story about the grandfather who only looked at the dried yellow croakers tied on a string while eating?
BridalClass1-2ED_131.korean: …왜, 줄에 묶인 굴비만 쳐다보며 밥을 먹는 할아버지 이야기가 생각나는 것이더냐.

BridalClass1-2ED_134.english: Next time, I hope you follow the proper dress code… You're out.
BridalClass1-2ED_134.korean: 다음부턴 정상적인 드레스코드를 맞추고 오길 바라요… 탈락입니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_136.english: ...The queen is wearing the clothes of a wife who is comforting her injured husband.
BridalClass1-2ED_136.korean: …여왕, 다친 남편을 어루만지는 아내의 옷 입었어.

BridalClass1-2ED_137.english: Then why didn't you come wearing proper nurse clothes? Why the mask…
BridalClass1-2ED_137.korean: 그럼 제대로 된 간호사 옷을 입고 오지 그러셨어요? 왜 마스크를…

BridalClass1-2ED_138.english: If you wear it after taking it… Daphne and Lise will hate it.

BridalClass1-2ED_140.english: Haha, how is it, President… no. Judge? This outfit is decent enough to enjoy swimming with kids.
BridalClass1-2ED_140.korean:
하하, 어떤가, 통령… 아니. 심사위원?
이 옷은 아이와 함께 수영을 즐기기에도 적합한 건전한 옷이지.

BridalClass1-2ED_141.english: Hmm… Captain Mari, the intention is good, but… it feels kind of more dangerous…
BridalClass1-2ED_141.korean: 으음… 마리 대장, 취지는 좋은데… 뭔가 더 위험한 느낌이…

BridalClass1-2ED_142.english: Have the judges call out the participants' names. That way, my commitment as a wife will come across better, right?
BridalClass1-2ED_142.korean:
심사위원, 참가자 명으로 불러주게.
그래야 아내로서의 다짐이 더 잘 살아나지 않겠나.

BridalClass1-2ED_143.english:
Participant name, isn't having a well-raised son better than ten daughters?  
Still, this is the most modest outfit I've seen among the participants.
BridalClass1-2ED_143.korean:
참가자 명, 잘 키운 아들 열 딸 안부럽다 양?
그래도 봤던 참가자 중에 제일 건전한 옷이네요.

BridalClass1-2ED_145.english: On a hot summer day, a mom gently teaching her tanned son how to swim... Just imagining it feels wholesome, beautiful, and full of maternal love.
BridalClass1-2ED_145.korean:
무더운 여름 날, 구릿빛으로 탄 아들한테 다정하게 수영을 가르치는 엄마라…
상상만 해도 건전하고 아름다우며 모성애가 느껴지는 모습이군.

BridalClass1-2ED_147.english:
…Mari's look doesn't seem ordinary.  
Still, out of all the clothes I've seen, this one's… kind of better.
BridalClass1-2ED_147.korean:
…마리의 눈빛이 심상치 않아 보이는구나.
그래도 봐왔던 옷 중 가장… 낫긴 한데.

BridalClass1-2ED_148.english: LRL... just pretend you don't know.
BridalClass1-2ED_148.korean: LRL 양... 그냥 모르는 척 해주세요.

BridalClass1-2ED_149.english: This participant... just give me the protein, okay?

BridalClass1-2ED_15.english: Do you really think a husband worn out from work is looking for a wife dressed like that? If not, is it a perfect dinner with steam rising from the food? Even Mount Geumgang looks better after a meal.
BridalClass1-2ED_15.korean:
일에 지친 남편이 찾는 게 과연 그런 옷차림을 한 아내겠사옵니까?
그게 아니라면 따끈한 김이 올라오는 완벽한 저녁 밥상이겠사옵니까? 금강산도 식후경이옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_150.english: Phew, oh boy… maybe it’s because the other participants all wore beautiful clothes…
BridalClass1-2ED_150.korean: 후우, 이런 이런… 다른 참가자 분들이 아름다운 옷만 입고 와서 그런가…

BridalClass1-2ED_151.english: I was thinking about what it means to have dignity as a wife, and the clothes I ended up wearing… are just so plain…
BridalClass1-2ED_151.korean: 아내로써의 품위가 뭘까 생각하다 입은 옷이… 너무 평범한…

BridalClass1-2ED_154.english: Finally, Scathy is wearing clothes!! That's really amazing!!
BridalClass1-2ED_154.korean: 드디어 스카디가 옷을 입고 오다니!! 정말 대단하구나!!

BridalClass1-2ED_155.english: ...Wait, if someone saw this, they'd think I walk around naked all the time?
BridalClass1-2ED_155.korean: …잠깐, 누가 보면 맨날 옷을 벗고 다니는 줄 알겠어요?

BridalClass1-2ED_156.english: Weren't you walking around naked all the time…

BridalClass1-2ED_157.english:
"Wait, LRL judges? Again, those clothes are wearable computers!!
When we first met, he treated me like a pervert, so do you still see me that way?!"
BridalClass1-2ED_157.korean:
잠깐, LRL 심사위원? 다시 말하지만 그 옷은 웨어러블 컴퓨터에요!!
처음 만날 때도 변태 취급하더니, 아직까지 그렇게 보고 계신 건가요?!

BridalClass1-2ED_158.english: Anyway, I'm so touched. I'm happy to finally see proper clothes after a long time!!
BridalClass1-2ED_158.korean: 어쨌든 감격스럽도다. 간만에 제대로 된 옷을 보게 되어 짐도 기쁘구나!!

BridalClass1-2ED_160.english: I'm not really sure, but... seeing that the LRL judges praised it a lot, I'll pass you.
BridalClass1-2ED_160.korean: 전 잘 모르겠지만… LRL 심사위원이 극찬을 한 걸 보아 합격 드리겠습니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_162.english: This outfit is one that vows to serve my husband as his secretary for life.
BridalClass1-2ED_162.korean: 이 옷은, 남편에게 평생 비서할 것을 맹세하는 옷이에요.

BridalClass1-2ED_163.english: Be... no, really, it’s 60KG. Uh, um. It’s good that you came in outfits that aren’t funeral clothes.
BridalClass1-2ED_163.korean:
베... 아니, 진짜 60KG 맞음 양.
…어, 음. 상복이 아닌 복장을 하고 온 건 좋은데.

BridalClass1-2ED_164.english: It feels a bit over the top to say it's my wife's clothes—
BridalClass1-2ED_164.korean: 아내의 옷이라고 보기엔 조금 과한 느낌이ㅡ

BridalClass1-2ED_165.english: Beta sister… I didn't know it was this white!!
BridalClass1-2ED_165.korean: 베타 언니… 이렇게 하얀 줄은 몰랐어!!

BridalClass1-2ED_166.english: W-well, this is the first time I’ve worn it openly in front of anyone… so… um…
BridalClass1-2ED_166.korean: 그… 그게, 누구 앞에서 대놓고 입은 건 이번이 처음인데… 그러니까… 으음…

BridalClass1-2ED_167.english: …You used to look like a ghost straight out of a horror movie! But today, you’re different!
BridalClass1-2ED_167.korean: …전에는 공포 영화에서나 나올 법한 귀신 같았는데! 오늘은 달라!

BridalClass1-2ED_168.english: Hehe… heh… Master also said I look beautiful in these clothes. So, don't you think you could say it's an outfit befitting a wife's elegance?
BridalClass1-2ED_168.korean:
헤헤… 헤에… 주인님도 이런 옷을 입은 절 아름답다고 칭찬해줬어요.
그러니까, 아내의 품격에 걸맞는 옷이라고 할 수 있지 않을까요?

BridalClass1-2ED_17.english: I never learned that a wife I know should dress like this and be some kind of seductress taking her husband's vitality.
BridalClass1-2ED_17.korean:
소첩이 아는 아내란, 이런 옷차림을 하고서
남편의 정기를 취하는 색귀라고 배운 적 없사옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_170.english: Maybe it's because the people who came to the preliminaries were too intense…
BridalClass1-2ED_170.korean: 예선전에 입고 오신 분들이 너무 과격해서 그런가…

BridalClass1-2ED_172.english: Oh no… it seems there are some people who had to be automatically marked as absent today due to various circumstances.
BridalClass1-2ED_172.korean: 이런… 금일 여러 사정으로 자리를 비워 아쉽게 자동 기권 처리된 분들도 계시는군요.

BridalClass1-2ED_173.english: So, is this the end now, President?

BridalClass1-2ED_174.english: Phew… now there are only three left.

BridalClass1-2ED_176.english: Our neighborhood Chief Jung-sil, the Head Chef's soliloquy, only Lise…
BridalClass1-2ED_176.korean: 우리동네 정실대장 님, 주방장의 혼잣말 님, 오직 리제만 님…

BridalClass1-2ED_177.english: ...You all have nicknames with strong personalities. I can tell who you are right away.
BridalClass1-2ED_177.korean: …다들 자아가 강하신 닉네임이군요. 누군지 바로 알겠어요.

BridalClass1-2ED_179.english: Well, the master's wife can only be Lise.
BridalClass1-2ED_179.korean: 그야 주인님의 아내는 오직 리제만 가능하니까요.

BridalClass1-2ED_18.english: Here, take a look. This is a material called 'Songs of Girls' that I've been reading whenever I have some free time lately.
BridalClass1-2ED_18.korean: 자 보시옵소서. 소첩이 요즘 쉴 때마다 읽고 있는 '소녀경'이란 자료이옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_180.english: Lise, you actually came wearing pretty neat clothes?
BridalClass1-2ED_180.korean: 리제양, 의외로 단정한 옷을 입고 오셨군요?

BridalClass1-2ED_181.english: These are the clothes I wore when I used to write an exchange diary with Master.
BridalClass1-2ED_181.korean: 주인님과 교환 일기를 쓸 적 입었던 옷이에요.

BridalClass1-2ED_182.english: It's an outfit that really shows the dignity of being a wife.

BridalClass1-2ED_183.english: Hmph, acting like a wife just because you barely exchanged letters with your master.
BridalClass1-2ED_183.korean: 흥, 겨우 주인님과의 필담을 나눈 것 가지고 아내처럼 행세하다니.

BridalClass1-2ED_184.english: Not the dignity of a wife, just stuck in the feelings of a middle school girl.
BridalClass1-2ED_184.korean: 아내의 품격이 아닌, 그저 여중생 감성에 머물러 있네.

BridalClass1-2ED_185.english: What did you say, you little sunbeam!!

BridalClass1-2ED_186.english: You, wearing that tacky and weird leather outfit!
BridalClass1-2ED_186.korean: 그 천박하고 이상한 가죽 옷을 입은 주제에!

BridalClass1-2ED_187.english: Hehe, do you really think I wore these clothes just for some vulgar purpose?
BridalClass1-2ED_187.korean: 후훗, 내가 그저 저속한 목적을 위해 이 옷을 입었다고 생각해?

BridalClass1-2ED_188.english: This is the outfit that you and I wore when we did the play.
BridalClass1-2ED_188.korean: 이 옷은 주인님과 내가 연극을 했을 때 입었던 의상이지.

BridalClass1-2ED_189.english: Hehe, my master even gave me glass slippers as a gift in that play.
BridalClass1-2ED_189.korean: 후훗, 주인님은 자그마치 그 연극에서 나한테 유리 구두까지 선물해줬다고.

BridalClass1-2ED_19.english: Please take a look at the 'Bangjung technique' part here.

BridalClass1-2ED_191.english: Are you talking about that crazy song that would be insanely exhausting if they did it live?
BridalClass1-2ED_191.korean: 라이브 공연이라도 했다간 엄청 힘들 것 같은 그 정신 사나운 노래 말이더냐?

BridalClass1-2ED_192.english:
Hehe, Master also praised my singing, right?  
LRL, you’ve never been to Cafe Amor, so you probably haven’t heard my live performance in person, have you?
BridalClass1-2ED_192.korean:
후훗, 주인님께서도 제 노래를 듣고 칭찬하셨죠.
LRL 양은 카페 아모르에 오신 적 없으니 라이브를 직접 들어본 적 없으시겠군요?

BridalClass1-2ED_193.english: Hii… I also want to listen to the live show…

BridalClass1-2ED_194.english: Hehe, if LRL sees me favorably this time, I’d be happy to even help with your singing practice?
BridalClass1-2ED_194.korean: 후훗, 이번에 LRL 양께서 절 좋게 봐주신다면, 기꺼이 노래 연습까지 도와드릴 수 있답니다?

BridalClass1-2ED_195.english: I-is it really true! Since I also like singing, of course…
BridalClass1-2ED_195.korean: 지, 진짜인 것이냐! 짐도 노래를 부르는 것을 좋아하니 당연히…

BridalClass1-2ED_196.english: When it comes to clothes, of course, what's most important is that they suit their purpose.
BridalClass1-2ED_196.korean: 무릇 옷이라 하면, 그 용도에 맞는 게 무엇보다 중요하겠지요.

BridalClass1-2ED_197.english: I’ve prepared an outfit that suits my affection for you and your dignity.
BridalClass1-2ED_197.korean: 소첩은 주인을 향한 애정과 그 품격에 걸맞는 의상을 준비했사옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_198.english: Huh, I wonder what they put in the drink I'm holding this time?
BridalClass1-2ED_198.korean: 흥, 이번엔 들고 있는 술에 뭘 탔을 까나?

BridalClass1-2ED_201.english: It's about a concubine's boundless love and sacrifice for her master, and the medicine called affection and devotion♥
BridalClass1-2ED_201.korean: 주인에 대한 소첩의 무한한 사랑과 희생, 그리고 애정과 헌신이란 약을 말이지요♥

BridalClass1-2ED_203.english: That's the coolest answer I heard from the challengers today.
BridalClass1-2ED_203.korean: 오늘 들었던 도전자 분들의 대답 중 가장 멋진 대답이네요.

BridalClass1-2ED_204.english: It's the most proper outfit I wanted to see, and a great ambition.
BridalClass1-2ED_204.korean: 제가 보고 싶었던 가장 올바른 복장이자, 멋진 포부예요.

BridalClass1-2ED_206.english: M-Master, I’ll exterminate all the pests for you!!
BridalClass1-2ED_206.korean: 주… 주인님의 해충은 제가 모조리 박멸해버리겠어요!!

BridalClass1-2ED_207.english: That's why!! If the pests come right away, I'll kill them!
BridalClass1-2ED_207.korean: 그, 그러니까!! 다, 당장 해충들이 오면 제가 도륙을!

BridalClass1-2ED_208.english: I'm the one who's going to be the master's main wife!
BridalClass1-2ED_208.korean: 주인님의 정실 대장이 되는 건 저예요!

BridalClass1-2ED_209.english: Make the master's bedroom security even stricter…!!

BridalClass1-2ED_21.english: It says that women are beings of yin, and men are beings of yang.
BridalClass1-2ED_21.korean: 여자는 음의 존재로, 남자는 양의 존재로 써있사옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_211.english: Labiata, you look like you have a lot on your mind.

BridalClass1-2ED_212.english: ...No. If it's those three, I expected them to act like that.

BridalClass1-2ED_213.english: I want to approve it because I see the determination of those three, but… what do you think, LRL?
BridalClass1-2ED_213.korean: 저 세 분의 결의를 좋게 보기에 통과를 시켜주려 하는데… LRL 양은 어떻게 생각하세요?

BridalClass1-2ED_214.english: Hmm… I've been watching my three older sisters for a long time.
BridalClass1-2ED_214.korean: 으음… 짐은 오랫동안 세 언니들을 지켜보았노라.

BridalClass1-2ED_215.english: Jim doesn't really know what the president means by a 'true wife'… and since he doesn't have a mom either, he doesn't really know…
BridalClass1-2ED_215.korean: 짐은 통령이 말하는 '진정한 아내'가 무엇인지 잘 모르고… 엄마도 없어 잘 모르지만…

BridalClass1-2ED_216.english: I know those three sisters are unusually fond of their followers.
BridalClass1-2ED_216.korean: 저 세 언니들은 권속을 아끼는 마음이 유별나다는 건 알고 있노라.

BridalClass1-2ED_217.english: So LRL means you'll pass me, right?

BridalClass1-2ED_22.english: It says that especially in bed, a man's vitality is basically absorbed by the woman.
BridalClass1-2ED_22.korean: 특히나 잠자리에선 남자의 양기가 필수적으로 여자에게 흡수된다 적혀있사옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_220.english: Yeah, being unusual just means you're that honest.
BridalClass1-2ED_220.korean: 그래요, 유별나다는 건 그만큼 솔직하다는 거니까요.

BridalClass1-2ED_221.english: I'll go along with what LRL said too.

BridalClass1-2ED_222.english: Orca's Bride: Preliminary rounds are over. ...Out of a total of 500 challengers, 11 survived.
BridalClass1-2ED_222.korean:
오르카의 신부: 예선전 종료.
…도전자 수 총 500명 중 11명 생존.

BridalClass1-2ED_23.english: Miss, the reason we use ingredients that boost energy even in the master's food is the same.
BridalClass1-2ED_23.korean: 소첩, 주인의 음식에도 양기를 북돋는 식재료를 사용하는 이유도 동일하옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_24.english: What do you want to say?

BridalClass1-2ED_25.english: "...Like this poor gardener peeking like a stray cat from the side, I dare to suggest that you carefully consider what kind of clothing can achieve a harmony of yin and yang."
BridalClass1-2ED_25.korean:
…옆에서 도둑고양이처럼 훔쳐보는 이 불쌍한 정원사처럼
음과 양의 조화를 이룰 수 있는 의복이 무엇일지 잘 헤아리기를 감히 조언하겠사옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_28.english: Did you think you wouldn't stand out wearing that ragged swimsuit?
BridalClass1-2ED_28.korean: 그 넝마 같은 수영복을 입고 돌아다니는데 눈에 안 띌 거라 생각했어?

BridalClass1-2ED_29.english: When was it that you used to teach us saying it’s limited to just the physical stuff or whatever?
BridalClass1-2ED_29.korean: 언제는 육체적인 것에 한정되어 있다느니 뭐니 하며 우릴 가르칠 땐 언제고?

BridalClass1-2ED_3.english: The preliminaries are just a few days away.

BridalClass1-2ED_30.english: The clothes of the crew around the master have been getting bolder and bolder.
BridalClass1-2ED_30.korean: 주인님 주변의 대원들 옷이, 점점 더 대범해졌어.

BridalClass1-2ED_31.english: ...Did Titania just make a bikini out of a surgical mask?
BridalClass1-2ED_31.korean: …당장이라도 티타니아 언니는 수술용 마스크로 비키니를 만들었다니까?
