BridalClass1-2ED_32.english: Sure, these days, maybe to seduce the master, all the members have certainly become bolder…
BridalClass1-2ED_32.korean: 확실히, 요즘 주인님을 유혹하기 위해서인지 대원분들 모두가 대범해지긴 했지...

BridalClass1-2ED_33.english: I guess I should hurry and ask the Audrey sisters for some new outfits…
BridalClass1-2ED_33.korean: 아무래도 서둘러 오드리 자매분께 새로운 의상을 부탁해야…

BridalClass1-2ED_35.english: No, I think for this exam… it's not about wearing eye-catching clothes, it's more about being recorded.
BridalClass1-2ED_35.korean: 아니, 이 시험은 소첩이 생각해보기에… 시선을 사로잡는 옷을 입는 게 아니라 사료되옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_36.english: The fact that they openly revealed the important preliminary round questions… I definitely think there's some other meaning hidden in this.
BridalClass1-2ED_36.korean: 중요한 예선전 문제를 대놓고 알려주었다는 것은… 분명 다른 의미가 숨겨졌다 생각하옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_37.english: So, chef, what do you want to say?
BridalClass1-2ED_37.korean: 요리사, 하고 싶은 말이 뭐야 그래서?

BridalClass1-2ED_39.english: Not an outfit that steals the master's gaze…

BridalClass1-2ED_4.english: ...The promotional material already has the preliminary round theme written on it.

BridalClass1-2ED_40.english: So this outfit is supposed to show some kind of determination that the master’s true wife is me?
BridalClass1-2ED_40.korean: 주인님의 진정한 아내는 바로 나라는 어떤 결의를 나타내는 복장이란 거지?

BridalClass1-2ED_43.english: Now that I think about it, I felt it when I wrote the exchange diary with master.
BridalClass1-2ED_43.korean: 생각해보니, 주인님과 교환 일기를 썼을 때 느꼈어.

BridalClass1-2ED_44.english: Master was more interested in normal things like games and movies rather than physical relationships.
BridalClass1-2ED_44.korean: 주인님께선 육체적 관계보단, 게임, 영화… 평범한 것에 더 많은 관심을 가져주셨어.

BridalClass1-2ED_45.english: You understood pretty quickly. I thought you were an idiot.
BridalClass1-2ED_45.korean: 꽤 빨리 알아들으셨군요. 바보이신 줄 알았더니만.

BridalClass1-2ED_46.english: I don't want to hear that kind of thing from the idiot who tried to brainwash my master with drugs.
BridalClass1-2ED_46.korean: 주인님을 약으로 세뇌하려 했던 멍청이한테 그런 말 듣긴 싫은데?

BridalClass1-2ED_48.english: I went out of my way to teach you, and you're just going to ignore my kindness?
BridalClass1-2ED_48.korean: 기껏 가르쳐주었더니, 소첩의 호의를 무시하는 것이옵니까?

BridalClass1-2ED_49.english: And I just want to say this while we’re at it, I hope you won’t act like a petty person criticizing old stuff.
BridalClass1-2ED_49.korean:
그리고 이번 기회에 말씀드리옵니다만, 철 지난 일을 가지고 헐뜯는 
소인배 같은 행동은 안 하셨으면 좋겠사옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_5.english: They say we should wear 'attire that suits the dignity of a wife'…
BridalClass1-2ED_5.korean: '아내의 품격에 맞는 복장'을 입고 오는 것이라고 하옵니다만…

BridalClass1-2ED_50.english: You do know it's embarrassing, huh?

BridalClass1-2ED_51.english: Looks like you've grown a bit, since you're not thinking about brainwashing the judges with drugs?
BridalClass1-2ED_51.korean: 심사위원을 약으로 세뇌할 생각은 안 하는 걸 보니 조금은 성장이란 걸 했구나?

BridalClass1-2ED_53.english: Hmph, you said something pointless. Well then, I guess I'll be looking forward to seeing what kind of clothes you'll wear.
BridalClass1-2ED_53.korean: 흥, 쓸데없는 말을 했군요. 어디, 그럼 무슨 옷을 입고 오실지 기대하겠사옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_54.english: It's well known that two people who work closely with the owner a lot…
BridalClass1-2ED_54.korean: 주인의 가장 가까운 곁에서 많은 일을 하고 계신다고 잘 알려진 두 분께서…

BridalClass1-2ED_55.english: I hope you avoid getting upset and whining out of jealousy over me after losing in the preliminaries.
BridalClass1-2ED_55.korean: 예선전부터 떨어지고선 소첩을 질투하며 질질 짜는 일은 없길 삼가 바라옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_57.english: Thanks anyway. I think I’ve got the hang of it a bit, thanks to you.
BridalClass1-2ED_57.korean: 그래도 고마워. 덕분에 어느 정도 감 잡은 것 같아.

BridalClass1-2ED_58.english: I guess I should just wear the special clothes that are deeply engraved for master.
BridalClass1-2ED_58.korean: 주인님께 깊게 각인된, 특별한 옷을 입고 가면 되겠지.

BridalClass1-2ED_59.english: Pest, why don't you even wear that weird bikini you wore before?
BridalClass1-2ED_59.korean: 해충, 전에 입었던 요상한 비키니라도 입고 오지 그래?

BridalClass1-2ED_6.english: Why? Did you even admire it or something?

BridalClass1-2ED_60.english: A weird bikini… it's still more intact than the swimsuit you butchered with scissors.
BridalClass1-2ED_60.korean: 요상한 비키니라니… 멀쩡한 수영복을 가위로 난도질 했던 네 옷보단 멀쩡하다고.

BridalClass1-2ED_62.english: And I already have the clothes I’ve marked. I just hope you don’t end up alone tomorrow crying your eyes out.
BridalClass1-2ED_62.korean:
그리고 난 벌써 점 찍어둔 옷이 있거든. 
너야말로 내일 혼자 떨어지고 엉엉 우는 일은 없길 바라.

BridalClass1-2ED_63.english: You mean someone like me, who knows the master so intimately, would fall apart?
BridalClass1-2ED_63.korean: 주인님과 깊은 부분까지 알고 지낸 내가 떨어진다고?

BridalClass1-2ED_64.english: I'll take this opportunity to prove that I'm different from you pests.
BridalClass1-2ED_64.korean: 이 기회에 증명하겠어, 너희 해충들과 난 격이 다르단 걸 보여줄게.

BridalClass1-2ED_65.english: …Wow, a lot of people have gathered.

BridalClass1-2ED_66.english: Hoho, Commander Labiata. Did you say that you need the superior insight contained in my matter?
BridalClass1-2ED_66.korean: 후훗, 라비아타 통령. 짐의 사안에 담긴 우월한 통찰이 필요하다 하였느냐?

BridalClass1-2ED_68.english: I will clearly figure out the perfect wife for my follower, so don't worry!
BridalClass1-2ED_68.korean: 짐이 명명백백히, 권속의 완벽한 아내를 가려낼 것이니 걱정 말거라!

BridalClass1-2ED_69.english: Yes, with LRL, you’ll definitely do well. Remember what I said before? Since the preliminaries will count a lot toward LRL’s score, please evaluate sharply.
BridalClass1-2ED_69.korean:
네, LRL 양이면 분명 잘 해낼 수 있을 거예요. 제가 했던 말은 기억하시죠?
이번 예선은 LRL 양의 점수가 크게 들어가는 만큼, 날카롭게 평가 부탁드려요.

BridalClass1-2ED_70.english: Hehe, since the president said it, I'll keep it in mind. I'll judge while thinking of the sisters wearing clothes that aren't embarrassing even if you walk holding hands!
BridalClass1-2ED_70.korean:
후훗, 통령이 말하니, 명심하겠노라. 손 잡고 걸어도 
부끄럽지 않은 옷을 입은 언니들을 떠올리며 심사하겠노라!

BridalClass1-2ED_71.english: It's like thinking of you as Jim's 'mom'!

BridalClass1-2ED_72.english: Yeah, that's right. Even in the kids' eyes, you have to have the dignity to be trusted and followed as 'mom'.
BridalClass1-2ED_72.korean: 네 맞아요. 아이들 눈에도 '엄마'로써 믿고 따르는 품격을 지녀야 하죠.

BridalClass1-2ED_74.english: I'm really sorry, but aside from religious freedom... like a mom who goes outside without wearing underwear…
BridalClass1-2ED_74.korean:
정말 미안하지만, 종교의 자유와 별개로... 
야외에서 속옷을 안 입고 다니는 엄마라던가…

BridalClass1-2ED_76.english: A mom who casually goes out in the nude, for example.

BridalClass1-2ED_77.english: If the new humanity is rebuilt... This should never happen...!!
BridalClass1-2ED_77.korean: 신인류가 재건된다면… 절대 이런 일이 있어선 안 돼요…!!

BridalClass1-2ED_78.english: I trust you, LRL Yang. Please make a fair judgment.
BridalClass1-2ED_78.korean: 믿을게요 LRL 양. 공정한 심사를 부탁드려요.

BridalClass1-2ED_79.english: Don't worry. Then, let's start the evaluation!

BridalClass1-2ED_8.english: I can't help but seriously wonder if that outfit really suits your dignity, my lady…
BridalClass1-2ED_8.korean: 그게 과연 품격에 맞는 의상인지, 소첩… 상당히 의구심이 생기옵니다.

BridalClass1-2ED_80.english: F... failing? What on earth is the reason for failing?
BridalClass1-2ED_80.korean: 부... 불합격이라니, 대체 어떤 사유로 불합격인 것이죠?

BridalClass1-2ED_81.english: ...Even if that outfit is a uniform recognized by the master.

BridalClass1-2ED_82.english: From the perspective of educating a child, I think this outfit is somewhat inappropriate.
BridalClass1-2ED_82.korean: 아이를 교육하는 입장으로선 다소 부적절한 옷이라고 생각이 되네요.

BridalClass1-2ED_83.english: I'm going to have to fail you.

BridalClass1-2ED_84.english: I-I can't accept this! I'm going to file an objection!!
BridalClass1-2ED_84.korean: 이, 인정할 수 없습니다! 이의를 신청하겠어요!!

BridalClass1-2ED_85.english: It's something I've felt every time I see Sekhmet…

BridalClass1-2ED_86.english: If you just lift the strap like this, can't you see it right away?
BridalClass1-2ED_86.korean: 이렇게 끈만 젖히면 바로 보이지 않느냐?

BridalClass1-2ED_87.english: Hey, don't lift up the sacred clothes, LRL!!!
BridalClass1-2ED_87.korean: 서, 성스러운 옷을 젖히지 마시지요, LRL 양!!!

BridalClass1-2ED_88.english: ...I can't imagine my mom wearing clothes like this.
BridalClass1-2ED_88.korean: …우리 엄마가 이런 옷을 입고 다닌다고 생각하면.

BridalClass1-2ED_89.english: Honestly, my stuff is kind of embarrassing…

BridalClass1-2ED_9.english: Heh heh, you don't get it, Sowan. This outfit is from the Saman Maid series, clothes that maximize their original purpose.
BridalClass1-2ED_9.korean:
후훗, 뭘 모르네, 소완.
이 옷은 삼안 메이드 시리즈, 본연의 역할을 극대화하는 옷이지.

BridalClass1-2ED_91.english: I know better than anyone that motherhood and inner feelings suit my wife…
BridalClass1-2ED_91.korean: 모성과 속마음은 그 누구보다 아내에 적합하다는 걸 알지만...

BridalClass1-2ED_92.english: I hope you think about the education of the kids who are going to be born.

BridalClass1-2ED_93.english: sister… no, I came wearing the most suitable outfit as the judge's wife.
BridalClass1-2ED_93.korean: 언니… 아니, 심사위원님 아내로써 가장 알맞은 옷을 입고 왔어요.

BridalClass1-2ED_94.english: This should be clothes that match my wife's class, right?
BridalClass1-2ED_94.korean: 이 정도면 아내의 품격에 맞는 옷이겠지요?

BridalClass1-2ED_95.english: ...Alice. In public settings, you should call him 'Judge.'

BridalClass1-2ED_96.english: Rather than a wife, I'm more like a dress trying to win His Majesty's favor.
BridalClass1-2ED_96.korean: 아내라기보단, 폐하의 총애를 얻어보려는 옷에 가깝겠죠.

BridalClass1-2ED_98.english: You covered that shallow chest with jewels, and now what right do you have to talk about being a 'wife'?
BridalClass1-2ED_98.korean: 그 천박한 가슴을 보석으로 가린 주제에 무슨 낯짝으로 '아내'를 논하시는 거죠?

BridalClass1-2ED_99.english: Are you done talking now? What's wrong with a bikini adorned with jewels that matches my wife's dignity!
BridalClass1-2ED_99.korean: 지금 말 다 하셨어요? 아내의 품격에 맞는 보석으로 치장한 비키니가 뭐 어때서요!

BridalClass1-3ED_10.english: Girls, I folded all the laundry that was hanging out this time.
BridalClass1-3ED_10.korean: 언니들, 이번에 널어놓은 빨래들 다 개어놨어요.

BridalClass1-3ED_100.english: ...So, um. Is it right to wash underwear separately?
BridalClass1-3ED_100.korean: …그러니까. 속옷은 따로 세탁을 하는 게 맞는 것이옵니까?

BridalClass1-3ED_102.english: ...I will jot it down in this notebook.

BridalClass1-3ED_103.english: I didn’t know, since I hardly do any housework at the residence.
BridalClass1-3ED_103.korean: 소첩, 숙소에서 집안일을 거의 하지 않으니 몰랐사옵니다.

BridalClass1-3ED_104.english: By any chance, was there anything I did at the accommodation that was lacking?
BridalClass1-3ED_104.korean: 혹여, 숙소에서 제가 했던 일 중 미흡했던 일이 더 있었사옵니까?

BridalClass1-3ED_105.english: Why all of a sudden… are you doing this…? Head chef?

BridalClass1-3ED_106.english: ...The first round test is the four-event competition of supporting one's spouse.

BridalClass1-3ED_107.english: Laundry, cleaning, and so on… it’s about testing the skills needed for supporting someone at home.
BridalClass1-3ED_107.korean: 세탁, 청소 등등… 내조에 필요한 소양을 시험보는 것이지요.

BridalClass1-3ED_108.english: All I know is cooking, so I'm pretty lacking in wisdom.
BridalClass1-3ED_108.korean: 소첩이 아는 것이라곤, 그저 요리밖에 없기에 지혜가 많이 모자라옵니다.

BridalClass1-3ED_109.english: So that's why the head chef has been doing all the chores around the accommodation for the past few days?
BridalClass1-3ED_109.korean: 그것 때문에 며칠 전부터 계속 총주방장님께서 숙소 잡일을 전부 하셨던 거군요?

BridalClass1-3ED_110.english: Since I ended up doing something I normally wouldn’t, I was quite lacking in my duties. Later, when I get a can of tuna, I’ll buy you two new underwear.
BridalClass1-3ED_110.korean:
괜히 하지 않던 것을 하다보니, 소첩이 많이 부족했사옵니다.
나중에 제가 참치캔을 받으면 두 분의 속옷을 새로 사드리지요.

BridalClass1-3ED_113.english: "When the concubine falls, Soyang, who serves the master, might just think that she's lacking compared to the other Orcas…"
BridalClass1-3ED_113.korean:
소첩이 떨어지면, 주인을 모시는 소양이 
그저 다른 오르카 분들에 비해 부족하겠구나 생각하겠지만…

BridalClass1-3ED_115.english: I want to prove to that gardener and Miss Lilith that my skills are not limited to just cooking.
BridalClass1-3ED_115.korean: 그 정원사와 리리스 양께 소첩 능력의 한계가 요리 뿐이 아님을 증명하고 싶사옵니다.

BridalClass1-3ED_116.english: I thought the chef would breeze through everything…
BridalClass1-3ED_116.korean: 주방장님께선 여유롭게 다 통과하실 줄 알았는데...

BridalClass1-3ED_118.english: Sochup is a bio-android created solely for cooking.
BridalClass1-3ED_118.korean: 소첩은 오로지 요리를 위해 만들어진 바이오로이드.

BridalClass1-3ED_119.english: Except for cooking, my basic knowledge isn't any different from yours. Or maybe it's even worse.
BridalClass1-3ED_119.korean: 요리를 제외한다면, 기본 소양은 여러분들과 다를 게 없사옵니다. 혹은 더 떨어질 테지요.

BridalClass1-3ED_120.english: It's the first time the chef has said something like this…

BridalClass1-3ED_121.english: I'm a kitchen maid, so I'm not as professional as the battle maids…
BridalClass1-3ED_121.korean: 전 키친 메이드라 배틀 메이드 분들보다 전문적이진 못하지만…

BridalClass1-3ED_122.english: I'll do my best to help you out so you can pass, Sowan!
BridalClass1-3ED_122.korean: 소완 님께서 통과하실 수 있게 최대한 옆에서 도와드릴게요!

BridalClass1-3ED_124.english: I thought I was only being hated…

BridalClass1-3ED_125.english: ...Still, it seems you must have accumulated a lot of virtue through your work. …
BridalClass1-3ED_125.korean: …그래도 일하며 많은 덕을 쌓긴 했나 보군요.

BridalClass1-3ED_126.english: Then, during the remaining time, would you give me some enlightenment?
BridalClass1-3ED_126.korean: 그럼 남는 시간 동안, 소첩에게 깨달음을 주시겠사옵니까?

BridalClass1-3ED_129.english: Yes, of course! Leave it to me!

BridalClass1-3ED_13.english: Dryad, can you give me some of my laundry?
BridalClass1-3ED_13.korean: 드리아드, 내 빨래 좀 줄 수 있니?

BridalClass1-3ED_130.english: I'm sure the head chef will do great! You'll handle it just as quickly and perfectly as you cook!
BridalClass1-3ED_130.korean:
분명 총주방장님께선 잘 해내실 거예요!
요리를 하는 실력만큼 빠르고 완벽하게 해내실 거예요!

BridalClass1-3ED_131.english: Hehe... you don't have to bother saying polite things unnecessarily…
BridalClass1-3ED_131.korean: 후후... 쓸데없이 입바른 말은 안 해주셔도 괜찮사옵니다만...

BridalClass1-3ED_132.english: Alright then, you two, I look forward to working with you.
BridalClass1-3ED_132.korean: 그럼 두 분, 모두 잘 부탁드리옵니다.

BridalClass1-3ED_133.english:
The more I get to know you~♬
I hope your heart feels the same as mine~♪
BridalClass1-3ED_133.korean:
내가 그대를 더 알게 될 수록~♬
그대 마음도 내맘과 같길 바라죠~♪

BridalClass1-3ED_134.english:
I don't want these feelings to be seen~♬
Even if I don't say it, please hold me~♪ …
BridalClass1-3ED_134.korean:
이런 맘 들키고 싶지 않지만~♬
말하지 않아도 나를 안아주세요~♪

BridalClass1-3ED_135.english: Lilith sister, did you call me?

BridalClass1-3ED_136.english: Yeah, Perrault. I've folded all the laundry here, so please put them nicely in the kids' closet, okay?
BridalClass1-3ED_136.korean: 응, 페로. 여기 세탁한 옷 다 개어 놨으니까 아이들 옷장에 잘 놔두렴?

BridalClass1-3ED_137.english: Stuff like this, you can have me and Feather handle it…
BridalClass1-3ED_137.korean: 이런 건 저랑 페더한테 시켜도 되는데…

BridalClass1-3ED_138.english: Don't get me wrong. It's not that I don't trust you guys,
BridalClass1-3ED_138.korean: 오해 말아줘. 너희들을 못 믿는 게 아니라,

BridalClass1-3ED_139.english: Lately, I wonder what you guys are up to whenever you clean your rooms… I'm curious because it's fun to see what you enjoy doing.
BridalClass1-3ED_139.korean:
너희들 숙소를 치울 때마다 요즘은 무얼 하고 있나…
어떤 걸 즐겨 하고 있나, 보는 재미가 있어서 그래.

BridalClass1-3ED_14.english: Yes, yep, sister! I’ll bring it to you!

BridalClass1-3ED_141.english: And if people hear that my younger siblings are clumsy or careless somewhere, I'd be upset… It's definitely better if I do it myself.
BridalClass1-3ED_141.korean: 그리고 내 동생들이 어디 가서 칠칠치 못하단 소리 들으면 속상하니까… 역시 내가 하는 게 좋아.

BridalClass1-3ED_142.english: Lately, seeing Fenrir diligently do the laundry and put out the clothes makes me feel relieved…
BridalClass1-3ED_142.korean: 요즘 펜리르도 꼬박꼬박 옷을 빤다고 내놓는 걸 보니 안심이 되네…

BridalClass1-3ED_143.english: It seems like Poi doesn't crumple up his clothes messily anymore…
BridalClass1-3ED_143.korean: 포이도 이젠 엉망으로 옷을 구기고 다니지 않는 것 같고...

BridalClass1-3ED_144.english: …Haha, sorry, sister. We have to take care of the lodging ourselves.
BridalClass1-3ED_144.korean: …하하, 죄송해요 언니. 숙소 일은 저희가 직접 해야 하는데.

BridalClass1-3ED_146.english: Sorry for making you sigh, sis…

BridalClass1-3ED_147.english: It's not that… Perrault… can you listen to my worries for a bit? Household support… that's the first topic. I don't know if I can get through it well…
BridalClass1-3ED_147.korean:
그게 아니라… 페로… 내 고민 좀 들어줄래?
내조… 그게 첫 번째 주제인데. 잘 통과할 수 있을지 모르겠어...

BridalClass1-3ED_148.english: Supporting my partner? Are you talking about protecting them by their side? If that's what you mean, then that's the thing you're best at, sis.
BridalClass1-3ED_148.korean:
내조? 주인님의 곁에서 신변을 보호하는 것 말씀인가요? 
그거라면 언니가 가장 잘하는 일인 걸요.

BridalClass1-3ED_149.english: Judging by President Labiata's actions… it seems like she's talking about the basic qualities one should have as a 'perfect wife.'
BridalClass1-3ED_149.korean: 라비아타 통령의 행보를 봐선… '완벽한 아내'로서 갖춰야 할 기본 소양을 말하는 것 같아.

BridalClass1-3ED_150.english: ...Hmm, somehow it seemed like the other participants were also really worried.
BridalClass1-3ED_150.korean: …흐음, 어쩐지 다른 참가자 분들도 고민이 많아 보이시더라고요.

BridalClass1-3ED_151.english: Saman's maid series are really traditional in that aspect, but…
BridalClass1-3ED_151.korean: 삼안의 메이드 시리즈들이야 그쪽 부분에선 워낙 정통하지만…

BridalClass1-3ED_152.english: Since we specialize in security... wouldn't we just look like amateurs in President Labiata's eyes?
BridalClass1-3ED_152.korean:
우린 경호를 전문적으로 하다 보니... 
라비아타 통령의 눈에는 그저 아마추어처럼 보이지 않을까?

BridalClass1-3ED_153.english: I'm confident that my sister will pass.

BridalClass1-3ED_154.english:
…Hehe, thanks for saying that, Perrault.  
I shouldn’t have said something weak just because I’m your older sister…
BridalClass1-3ED_154.korean:
…후후, 말이라도 고마워 페로.
괜히 언니로써 약한 말이나 하고…

BridalClass1-3ED_155.english: Ewwww?! Gross, don't stick to me!

BridalClass1-3ED_156.english: Hurry up and let's take a bath together, Poi, okay? Okay?
BridalClass1-3ED_156.korean: 얼른 가서 같이 목욕하자, 포이, 응? 응?

BridalClass1-3ED_158.english: Come here, Poi~ I'll give you a nice back rub, okay?
BridalClass1-3ED_158.korean: 이리 와, 포이~ 내가 시원하게 등 밀어준다니까?

BridalClass1-3ED_159.english: You're the only one allowed to touch my back, Master!! What do you mean going to the bathhouse with your sisters?!
BridalClass1-3ED_159.korean: 내 등을 만지는 건 주인님 뿐이야!! 무슨 자매들끼리 목욕탕에 가?!

BridalClass1-3ED_160.english: I was just about to look for you, perfect timing. Take clothes for Poi and Fenrir too.
BridalClass1-3ED_160.korean: 마침 찾으려 했는데, 잘 왔네. 포이랑 펜리르도 옷 가져가렴.

BridalClass1-3ED_161.english: Sniff sniff… Huh? The weird smell I smell all the time is gone?
BridalClass1-3ED_161.korean: 킁킁… 응? 맨날 맡던 이상한 냄새가 없어졌는데?

BridalClass1-3ED_162.english: Meow? That's right… hehe… I like it because my owner's scent is still on Poi's clothes…
BridalClass1-3ED_162.korean: 냐앙? 그렇네에… 히히… 포이 옷에 주인님 냄새가 남아 있어서 좋아…

BridalClass1-3ED_163.english: Didn't I put fabric softener in once before and all of you said the smell was so strong it made your noses hurt?
BridalClass1-3ED_163.korean:
전에 한 번 섬유 유연제를 넣었다가 
너희들 모두 코가 아플 정도로 냄새가 난다 하지 않았니.

BridalClass1-3ED_164.english: Yeah, it's really weird… not even flowers, just an unpleasant smell…
BridalClass1-3ED_164.korean: 맞아, 엄청 이상하고… 꽃도 아닌 불쾌한 냄새...

BridalClass1-3ED_165.english: It smelled a little strange. Poi likes the smell of flowers that comes from its owner.
BridalClass1-3ED_165.korean: 조금 이상한 냄새였어요. 포이는 주인님한테 나는 꽃 냄새가 좋은데.

BridalClass1-3ED_166.english: Did you smell like flowers to the master?

BridalClass1-3ED_167.english: Huh? It's always me. Master’s fragrant night flowers… Nyaaah?!
BridalClass1-3ED_167.korean: 엥? 늘 나잖아요. 주인님의 향긋한 밤꽃… 냐아아아앗?!

BridalClass1-3ED_168.english: It doesn't even smell like real flowers. Poi!

BridalClass1-3ED_169.english: That smell isn’t it the smell I get when you and the kids hang out with the commander?
BridalClass1-3ED_169.korean: 그 냄새는 언니랑 애들이 주인님이랑 놀다 오면 나는 냄새 아냐?

BridalClass1-3ED_17.english: Uh, sis? Why are you suddenly spreading out everything I had folded?! Are you maybe checking the laundry or something…
BridalClass1-3ED_17.korean: 어, 언니? 갑자기 개어놨던 걸 왜 죄다 펼치세요?! 혹시 빨래 확인이라도…

BridalClass1-3ED_170.english: It doesn't even smell like real flowers. Poi!

BridalClass1-3ED_172.english: sister, why are you suddenly laughing at us? Did we do something wrong or…
BridalClass1-3ED_172.korean: 언니, 갑자기 왜 저흴 보고 웃으세요? 혹시 저희가 뭘 잘못 하기라도…

BridalClass1-3ED_173.english: No. It's just, if I were to have master’s child…
BridalClass1-3ED_173.korean: 아니. 그냥, 만일 주인님의 자식을 낳게 되면…

BridalClass1-3ED_174.english: I thought it would be cute and nice if you had a daughter who looked just like you… Not just because of the contest, I’ve always had that kind of imagination.
BridalClass1-3ED_174.korean:
너희를 똑닮은 딸이라면 귀엽고 좋을 텐데… 라고 생각했어.
꼭 대회 때문이 아니라 줄곧 그런 상상을 하곤 했어.

BridalClass1-3ED_175.english: …Uhuhu, to think that someone who just lazes around like this is the master's daughter…
BridalClass1-3ED_175.korean: …우후후, 이렇게 노닥거리며 여유나 부리는 주제에 주인님의 딸이라니…

BridalClass1-3ED_176.english: I might end up getting laughed at by Lise and Sowan for no reason.
BridalClass1-3ED_176.korean: 괜히 이러다 리제랑 소완에게 비웃음 살지도 모르겠네.

BridalClass1-3ED_177.english: Well, I don't think my sister will fail…
BridalClass1-3ED_177.korean: 글쎄요, 전 언니가 떨어질 것 같다고 생각하지 않는데...

BridalClass1-3ED_178.english: Perrault, you're really close to being the perfect wife, you know, being kind enough to comfort your sister.
BridalClass1-3ED_178.korean: 페로야말로 완벽한 아내에 가깝구나, 착한 마음씨로 언니를 위로할 줄도 알고 말이야.

BridalClass1-3ED_179.english: No way! Lilith sister would never fail. She’s always doing the laundry and cleaning at our place!
BridalClass1-3ED_179.korean:
아냐! 리리스 언니는 절대 떨어질 리 없어.
늘 우리 숙소에서 빨래랑 청소를 해주잖아!

BridalClass1-3ED_180.english: Lilith is definitely going to be the perfect bride!
BridalClass1-3ED_180.korean: 리리스 언니는 분명 완벽한 신부가 틀림없어!

BridalClass1-3ED_181.english: Fenrir. Sister Lilith isn't a maid who takes care of things for you.
BridalClass1-3ED_181.korean: 펜리르. 리리스 언니는 당신 뒤치다꺼리를 대신 해주는 메이드가 아니에요.

BridalClass1-3ED_182.english: While we're at it, go ahead and do the cleaning around here or any random errands yourself. Be thankful that Lilith is our oldest sister.
BridalClass1-3ED_182.korean:
이 김에 주변 청소라던가, 잡다한 심부름은 직접 하세요.
리리스 언니가 저희 맏언니인 걸 감사하게 생각하시죠.

BridalClass1-3ED_183.english: If Fenrir had joined the Battle Maids like Hirume, he would have had a hard time every day.
BridalClass1-3ED_183.korean: 펜리르가 히루메처럼 배틀 메이드에 들어갔다면 매일 고생했을 거예요.

BridalClass1-3ED_184.english: Heehee~ That's why I like Lilith the most!
BridalClass1-3ED_184.korean: 이히히~ 그래서 난 리리스 언니가 제일 좋아!

BridalClass1-3ED_187.english: I'll show you guys that this Lilith is a step above the Stalker and Sowan.
BridalClass1-3ED_187.korean: 이 리리스가 스토커와 소완보다 한 수 위란 걸 너희들에게도 보여줄게.

BridalClass1-3ED_188.english: - After the preliminaries ended, I got the results from Labiata… Somehow, I let out a sigh.
BridalClass1-3ED_188.korean: - 예선전이 끝난 후 라비아타에게 결과를 보고받았는데… 왠지 한숨이 나왔다.

BridalClass1-3ED_189.english: We should probably review the Orca's costume approval rules again.
BridalClass1-3ED_189.korean: ...오르카의 복장 심의 규정을 다시 점검하는 게 좋겠네.

BridalClass1-3ED_190.english: I didn't expect so many members to be eliminated from the preliminaries.
BridalClass1-3ED_190.korean: 예선부터 이렇게 많은 대원들이 떨어졌을 거라고는 예상 못했어.

BridalClass1-3ED_191.english: Master, please check the evaluation criteria and judges for the next exam.
BridalClass1-3ED_191.korean: 주인님, 다음 시험의 평가 항목과 심사위원을 검토해 주세요.

BridalClass1-3ED_192.english: Hmm… the next evaluation… supporting my partner? Cleaning, grocery shopping… doing the dishes…
BridalClass1-3ED_192.korean: 으음… 다음 평가가… 내조? 청소, 장보기… 설거지…

BridalClass1-3ED_193.english: There are so many extra evaluation items... At this rate, I'm going to fail everything, huh?
BridalClass1-3ED_193.korean: 부가 평가 항목이 많네… 이러다간 전부 다 떨어지겠는데?

BridalClass1-3ED_194.english: This test isn't about having the kind of detailed expertise like a maid b-android, it's meant to assess the self-sufficiency needed to be a 'perfect wife.'
BridalClass1-3ED_194.korean:
이번 시험은 메이드 바이오로이드처럼 디테일한 전문성이 아닌,
'완벽한 아내'로써 필요한 자립력을 평가하는 게 목적이에요.

BridalClass1-3ED_195.english:
"If you don't even have the will to do it,
Won't your master, your father, take care of everything?"
BridalClass1-3ED_195.korean:
엄마가 하고자 하는 의지 조차 없다면 
아빠인 주인님께서 모든 일을 도맡아서 하지 않으시겠어요?

BridalClass1-3ED_196.english: A couple isn’t someone who leans on just one side; you should be someone each other can rely on.
BridalClass1-3ED_196.korean: 부부는 한 쪽에게 의지 받는 존재가 아니라, 서로에게 의지가 되어야 하는 존재에요.

BridalClass1-3ED_197.english: I guess since everyone has different skills and strengths, it might be hard to get good scores in all areas…
BridalClass1-3ED_197.korean: 아무래도 각자 특기나 장기가 다르다 보니 여러 항목에서 좋은 점수를 얻는 건 어려울 것 같은데…

BridalClass1-3ED_198.english: I know that the master cares for and loves the members equally... but as 'the origin of the new humans,' it's essential to be ready to 'act on your own.'
BridalClass1-3ED_198.korean:
주인님께서 대원들을 공평히 아끼고 사랑하는 마음은 알지만…
'신인류의 기원'으로써 '자율적으로 행동'하는 준비는 필수입니다.

BridalClass1-3ED_199.english: - ...Certainly, you can't ignore Labiata's experience that has existed since the time of the old humans.
BridalClass1-3ED_199.korean: - …확실히, 구 인류가 존재했을 때부터 살아왔던 라비아타의 경륜은 무시할 수 없다.

BridalClass1-3ED_2.english: Oh, Lise sister. What are you doing?
BridalClass1-3ED_2.korean: 어머, 리제 언니. 뭐 하고 계세요?

BridalClass1-3ED_20.english: sister, if you grip it that hard, the laundry will get wrinkled.
BridalClass1-3ED_20.korean: 언니, 그렇게 힘을 주면 빨래에 주름이 생겨요.

BridalClass1-3ED_200.english: Rather than seeing me as a 'participant' you care for only during the competition, how about seeing me as a 'wife' who will firmly take responsibility for the new life that’s been born?
BridalClass1-3ED_200.korean:
주인님께서도 대회를 진행하는 동안만큼은 참가자를 사랑하는 '대원'으로 보시기 보단, 
새로 태어난 생명을 굳건히 책임질 '아내'로 바라봐주시는 게 어떠실지요?

BridalClass1-3ED_201.english: Okay, it's unfamiliar, but I'll give it a try. Labiata. Keep up the good work.
BridalClass1-3ED_201.korean: 알겠어, 낯설지만 한 번 해볼게. 라비아타. 계속 수고해줘.

BridalClass1-3ED_202.english: - Even Labaita gives me a much softer smile in response.
BridalClass1-3ED_202.korean: - 내 대답에 라비아타도 훨씬 더 부드러운 미소를 지어준다.

BridalClass1-3ED_203.english: Thank you for trusting me, master.

BridalClass1-3ED_21.english: Especially for shirts, if you fold them like this, all the effort of ironing becomes pointless. So… like this… like this…
BridalClass1-3ED_21.korean:
특히나 셔츠 같은 경우는 이렇게 개면 다림질을 한 의미가 없어져요.
그러니까… 이렇게 해서… 이렇게…

BridalClass1-3ED_22.english: Alright, with this, it’s less likely to get wrinkled or creased when you wear it.
BridalClass1-3ED_22.korean: 자, 이 정도면 입었을 때도 덜 구겨지고 주름이 갈 거예요.

BridalClass1-3ED_23.korean: 다시 한 번 알려줄 수 있어?

BridalClass1-3ED_25.english: Wasn’t your main job usually cleaning or gardening? Why all of a sudden are you interested in the laundry we’re doing?
BridalClass1-3ED_25.korean:
언니는 주로 맡은 일이 청소나 정원 관리 아니었나요? 
갑자기 왜 저희들이 맡은 빨래에 관심이 생기신 거예요?

BridalClass1-3ED_27.english: You guys know that I passed the preliminaries of the bride survival competition, right?
BridalClass1-3ED_27.korean: 너희들, 내가 신부 서바이벌 대회 예선전을 통과한 건 알고 있지?

BridalClass1-3ED_28.english: Of course! I know. It’s just that I was really heartbroken when Titania sister fell, hahaha…
BridalClass1-3ED_28.korean: 물론이죠! 알고 있어요. 티타니아 언니가 떨어져서 상심이 컸다보니까요, 아하하...

BridalClass1-3ED_29.english: The first event in Labiata's test is the '4 Events of Being a Supportive Wife'.
BridalClass1-3ED_29.korean: 라비아타가 낸 첫 번째 시험의 종목은 '내조 4종 경기'야.

BridalClass1-3ED_30.english: ...I have basic knowledge, but honestly... I've never thought I was perfect, so I'm not sure if I can be good at being supportive.
BridalClass1-3ED_30.korean: …기본적인 지식은 있지만, 솔직히… 완벽하다고 생각해 본 적이 없어서 내조라는 걸 잘할 수 있을지 모르겠어.

BridalClass1-3ED_31.english: I see... phew... I was wondering if I did something wrong to Lise-sister again…
BridalClass1-3ED_31.korean: 그러셨군요… 휴우… 전 또 리제 언니한테 잘못한 게 있나 싶었어요…

BridalClass1-3ED_33.english: Huh? Why are you apologizing all of a sudden?

BridalClass1-3ED_34.english: ...I ended up on edge for no reason.

BridalClass1-3ED_36.english: I should definitely be the perfect wife for my master…
BridalClass1-3ED_36.korean: 주인님의 완벽한 아내는 분명 내가 돼야 하는데…

BridalClass1-3ED_37.english: "...I imagined myself falling, and that stalker and the chef laughing at me to their heart's content..."
BridalClass1-3ED_37.korean:
…내가 떨어지고 그 해충이랑 요리사가 
실컷 비웃는 모습을 상상했더니…

BridalClass1-3ED_38.english: I was wondering why you look so anxious…
BridalClass1-3ED_38.korean: 언니가 왜 이렇게 초조해 보이는 건지 궁금했는데…

BridalClass1-3ED_39.english: ...But the scary look like before has mostly disappeared.

BridalClass1-3ED_40.english: ...Because Master would probably dislike seeing me like that.

BridalClass1-3ED_42.english: I show you guys a lot of what your sister looks like.

BridalClass1-3ED_43.english: Yeah, Lise. I really like seeing you lately; it feels like you've grown a lot.
BridalClass1-3ED_43.korean: 그래, 리제. 요새 널 볼 때마다 많이 성장한 것 같아서 보기 좋아.

BridalClass1-3ED_44.english: Even Titania failed... Lise, seeing you be the only one of our sisters to pass somehow makes me feel proud.
BridalClass1-3ED_44.korean: 티타니아도 떨어졌는데... 리제 네가 자매들 중 유일하게 붙은 모습을 보니까 괜히 뿌듯하네.

BridalClass1-3ED_46.english: Supporting your partner... the topic is pretty abstract. Did Lise’s friends all say they didn’t know?
BridalClass1-3ED_46.korean: 내조라… 주제가 상당히 추상적이네. 리제 친구들은 다 모른다고 했니?

BridalClass1-3ED_48.english: I'm talking about Lilith and Sowan.

BridalClass1-3ED_49.english:
"Hmm... There's no way that pest and the chef know what's going on, sister.
They are not good enough to be perfect wives."
BridalClass1-3ED_49.korean:
흐, 흥… 그 해충이랑 요리사가 내조를 알 리 없잖아요, 언니.
완벽한 아내가 되기엔 한참이나 모자른 애들인데.

BridalClass1-3ED_50.english: Really? It seems like there are quite a lot of small and tricky things. There’s cleaning and laundry, of course… but also things like grocery shopping and cooking…
BridalClass1-3ED_50.korean:
그럴까? 자잘하고 까다로운 요소가 꽤 많을 것 같은데.
청소나 빨래도 있겠지만… 장보기나 요리 같은 것도 있고…

BridalClass1-3ED_51.english: ...You talk like you've already done it a lot.

BridalClass1-3ED_52.english: Ahaha… I'm lacking too, but I want to help Lise.
BridalClass1-3ED_52.korean: 아하하… 나도 부족하지만 리제한테 도움이 되고 싶어서.

BridalClass1-3ED_54.english: Why are you staring at me all of a sudden, sister?

BridalClass1-3ED_55.english: How silly. Do orca kids… ever get to experience being a couple?
BridalClass1-3ED_55.korean: 바보 같긴. 오르카 애들이… 부부를 경험한 적… 있겠어?

BridalClass1-3ED_56.english: What do you mean by that, Titania?

BridalClass1-3ED_57.english: Almost all the Orca kids... 90% got eliminated in the preliminaries.

BridalClass1-3ED_58.english: It means it's not about testing professional skills.
BridalClass1-3ED_58.korean: 전문적인 기술을 시험하는 게 아니라는 소리야.

BridalClass1-3ED_59.english: Now that I think about it, that's really true.

BridalClass1-3ED_6.english: ...Hey, do you happen to know how to do laundry?

BridalClass1-3ED_60.english: I’m not really sure what Labiata sister will be testing, but it probably won’t be an exam on the professional knowledge that maids typically know.
BridalClass1-3ED_60.korean:
라비아타 언니가 뭘 시험 볼진 잘 모르겠지만,
메이드 분들이 대표적으로 알고 있는 전문적인 지식을 시험 보는 게 아닐 거야.

BridalClass1-3ED_61.english: Is that really the case, sister? Still, if a stalker or a chef gets attached and I fall…
BridalClass1-3ED_61.korean: 정말 그럴까요, 언니? 그래도 스토커나 요리사가 붙고 제가 떨어지면…

BridalClass1-3ED_62.english: Surprisingly... it might be good to think simply.
BridalClass1-3ED_62.korean: 의외로... 단순하게 생각하는 게… 좋을 지도.

BridalClass1-3ED_64.english: Oh my God, Titania... Now I know how to really care for my brother. That's great!
BridalClass1-3ED_64.korean: 세상에, 티타니아... 이젠 정말 동생을 위할 줄도 알고. 대단해!

BridalClass1-3ED_66.english: I'm upset that I failed… If I start overthinking for no reason… it just becomes a hurdle.
BridalClass1-3ED_66.korean: 내가 떨어진 게 분해서 그래… 괜히 생각이 많아지면… 걸림돌이 돼.

BridalClass1-3ED_67.english: From what I’ve heard, before they perished, humans… especially human women… were afraid of cockroaches…
BridalClass1-3ED_67.korean: 내가 듣기론, 멸망 전, 인간들… 특히, 여자 인간들은… 바퀴벌레를 무서워 해서…

BridalClass1-3ED_68.english: She said she wanted her husband to catch her… and that she was trembling all over.

BridalClass1-3ED_69.english: You’re always the one in charge of pest control and cleaning…
BridalClass1-3ED_69.korean: 해충 구제와 청소는... 늘 네가 담당하고 있으니까…

BridalClass1-3ED_70.english: Your strengths… try to show them.

BridalClass1-3ED_72.english: Why is he acting like that all of a sudden?

BridalClass1-3ED_73.english: ...It's already been three hours, and you're just staring at the dishes we washed.
BridalClass1-3ED_73.korean: …벌써 3시간 째, 저희가 설거지 한 식기만 빤히 쳐다보고 계세요.

BridalClass1-3ED_77.english: Why did you suddenly get surprised?

BridalClass1-3ED_78.english: W-well, so… you’ve been staring at only the dishes I washed without blinking since earlier… so…
BridalClass1-3ED_78.korean:
그… 그게, 그러니까… 아까부터 눈 한 번을 깜빡 않으시고 
제가 씻은 식기만 계속 쳐다보셔서… 그러니까…

BridalClass1-3ED_8.english: I've done a few loads of laundry sometimes at the request of Vanilla or Lea, but…
BridalClass1-3ED_8.korean: 가끔 바닐라나 레아 언니 부탁으로 세탁기를 몇 번 돌려보긴 했지만…

BridalClass1-3ED_81.english: Are you saying that I was neglecting the dishes if I hadn't been watching all the time?
BridalClass1-3ED_81.korean: 제가 평소에 지켜보지 않았으면 설거지를 소홀히 하셨단 말씀이옵니까?

BridalClass1-3ED_82.english: No, head chef!!! That can't be true!!!

BridalClass1-3ED_84.english: I get so nervous that I end up making unnecessary jokes.
BridalClass1-3ED_84.korean: 긴장이 되다 보니, 쓸데없는 농이나 던지게 되는군요.

BridalClass1-3ED_85.english: If it's nervousness… could it be because of the first round of tests, Chef?

BridalClass1-3ED_86.english: It seems like you’re getting pretty good at reading your boss’s mood now?
BridalClass1-3ED_86.korean: 이젠 상사의 눈치를 제법 잘 보시는 것 같사옵니다?

BridalClass1-3ED_87.english: Eeeeeeek! No, Chef, I’ll work!! Haha!! Work is fun!! Kitchen work is fu-
BridalClass1-3ED_87.korean: 히이이이이이익! 아니에요 주방장님, 일 할게요!! 하하!! 일 재밌어!! 주방일 재밌ㅡ

BridalClass1-3ED_88.english: What are you planning to do during break time? Even if you're not doing anything, make sure to save your energy for later.
BridalClass1-3ED_88.korean:
브레이크 타임에 무슨 일을 하시려는 것이옵니까?
아무 일도 하지 않을 땐 나중을 위해서라도 힘을 비축해주시지요.

BridalClass1-3ED_9.english: I know how to do the laundry. But folding all the dry clothes nicely like they're new…
BridalClass1-3ED_9.korean: 세탁기 돌리는 법은 나도 알아. 그런데 다 마른 옷을 새 옷처럼 예쁘게 갠다거나…

BridalClass1-3ED_90.english: ...Um, but chef. A few days ago, you washed the swimsuit you were wearing, right?
BridalClass1-3ED_90.korean: …저, 근데 주방장님. 며칠 전에 주방장님께서 입으시던 수영복을 세탁하셨잖아요.

BridalClass1-3ED_91.english: It was like that when I went to Aqualand... Was there some kind of problem?
BridalClass1-3ED_91.korean: 아쿠아랜드를 다녀왔을 때 그랬습니다만… 무슨 문제라도 있었사옵니까?

BridalClass1-3ED_93.english: Portia and my underwear got the chef's swimsuit in water…
BridalClass1-3ED_93.korean: 포티아랑 제 속옷에 주방장님 수영복 물이 들어서…

BridalClass1-3ED_97.english: So… when you wash swimsuits, you should pre-wash them separately… and underwear should be taken out and washed on its own… but you put everything in together and ran the washing machine…
BridalClass1-3ED_97.korean:
그러니까… 수영복을 빠실 땐, 단독 세탁을 미리 해야 하고…
속옷은 따로 빼내서 세탁을 하는 게 맞는데… 다 넣고 세탁기를 돌리셔서…

BridalClass1-3ED_99.english: Kyaaaah!! I'm sorry!! Don't pull a kitchen knife out from your chest… huh?
BridalClass1-3ED_99.korean: 꺄아아아아앗!! 잘못했어요!! 품 속에서 식칼 뽑지 마세… 에?

BridalClass1-4ED_1.english: Nice to meet you. To all the challengers who passed the preliminaries.
BridalClass1-4ED_1.korean: 반갑습니다. 예선전을 통과하신 모든 도전자 여러분.

BridalClass1-4ED_10.english:
…Caterina Sforza. I hope you don't think too negatively.  
If we're comparing it to high school, I'd like you to think of it kind of like a student council committee.
BridalClass1-4ED_10.korean:
…카테리나 스포르차 양. 너무 부정적으로 생각하진 않아주셨으면 해요.
고등학교로 친다면, 일종의 선도위원회 격으로 생각해주셨으면 좋겠어요.

BridalClass1-4ED_100.english: All the traces of bugs that were crawling around the set are gone.
BridalClass1-4ED_100.korean: 세트장에 돌아다니던 벌레들의 흔적들이 전부 사라졌어요.

BridalClass1-4ED_103.english: Isn't that obvious? We have to get rid of the flies that fly into the master's sight.
BridalClass1-4ED_103.korean: 그야 당연한 거 아니겠어요? 주인님의 시야에 날아드는 날벌레는 제거해야죠.

BridalClass1-4ED_104.english: Hmm... Getting rid of pests in the house is part of cleaning, I guess…
BridalClass1-4ED_104.korean: 흐음... 집안의 해충을 박멸하는 것도 청소의 일부분이긴 합니다만…

BridalClass1-4ED_105.english: I guess it's the result of being overly obsessed with just one thing…
BridalClass1-4ED_105.korean: 한 가지 일에만 과도하게 매몰된 결과물이 아닐까 싶습니다만...

BridalClass1-4ED_106.english: I only have one 'wife rule'. It's 'my master's comfort'.

BridalClass1-4ED_107.english: While you're here, I've detected any pests that might annoy you every 10 seconds. It's my special skill and top-notch service that no one else dares to match.
BridalClass1-4ED_107.korean:
여기 있는 동안 주인님의 신경을 거스르는 해충의 움직임이 10초마다 파악됐어요.
남들은 감히 따라할 수 없는 제 특기이자 특급 서비스이죠.

BridalClass1-4ED_108.english:
"Why would a pest even dare fly onto our master's precious body?  
The only one allowed to fly into our master's arms is Lise."
BridalClass1-4ED_108.korean:
어딜 해충 따위가 하나뿐인 주인님의 옥체에 날아들죠?
주인님의 품에 날아들 수 있는 건 오직 리제뿐이라고요.

BridalClass1-4ED_11.english: Alright, let's get started. The time limit is 1 hour…

BridalClass1-4ED_110.english: It's okay, Master… ah…♥ Lise will protect you. Okay? Masterㅡ
BridalClass1-4ED_110.korean: 괜찮아요, 주인님은… 아아…♥ 리제가 지켜줄게요. 응? 주인님ㅡ

BridalClass1-4ED_112.english: It's not like only Lise's actions are meaningless. Pests are also sources of disease, spreading illnesses around.
BridalClass1-4ED_112.korean:
오직 리제만 도전자님의 행동이 의미 없는 건 아니에요.
해충은 질병을 옮기고 다니는 병의 근원이기도 하죠.

BridalClass1-4ED_113.english: "...That's true. Insects tend to gather around the crumbs left behind by the angels' snacks, but it is considered fine in terms of hygiene.
BridalClass1-4ED_113.korean:
…그렇긴 하죠. 천사님들이 먹고 남긴 다과 부스러기에
벌레들이 꼬이곤 하는데, 위생 면에서도 괜찮다고 평가됩니다.

BridalClass1-4ED_114.english: ...Alright. Only Lise will be allowed to pass as a challenger.

BridalClass1-4ED_116.english: ...Wait a minute. Why did you use a different dish soap instead of the one we prepared?
BridalClass1-4ED_116.korean: …잠깐만요. 왜 저희 쪽에서 준비한 세제 대신 다른 주방 세제를 쓰신 거죠?

BridalClass1-4ED_117.english: I don't want to use this detergent, so I used the detergent I brought from my kitchen.
BridalClass1-4ED_117.korean: 이 세제를 이용하고 싶지 않아, 제 주방에서 가져온 세제를 사용하였사옵니다.

BridalClass1-4ED_118.english: Hey… chef. No matter what, isn't the rule that we have to use the detergent we officially provide?
BridalClass1-4ED_118.korean: 이봐… 주방장. 아무리 그래도 우리가 정식으로 제공한 세제를 사용하는 게 룰 아니겠어?

BridalClass1-4ED_119.english: If by any chance this becomes a reason for rejection, I will humbly accept it… but could you please hear my side of the story?
BridalClass1-4ED_119.korean:
혹시나 이것이 탈락 사유가 된다면 겸허히 받아들이겠사오나…
소첩의 변백을 들어주시겠는지요?

BridalClass1-4ED_12.english: The basic requirement is to clean up the messy house and do the grocery shopping at the Saman branch until the master comes.
BridalClass1-4ED_12.korean:
어질러진 집안을 모두 정리하고, 주인님이 오실 때까지 
삼안 영업소에서 장을 보는 것 까지가 기본 조건입니다.

BridalClass1-4ED_120.english: Was the detergent you were using just better? Or maybe your skin is sensitive… If it’s not something like that, I’ve already got the stuff needed for the test ready.
BridalClass1-4ED_120.korean:
사용하던 세제가 성능이 더 좋았던 겁니까? 아님, 피부가 민감하셨다거나… 
그런 사연이 아니라면야 시험에 필요한 물품은 이미 구비해놨는데 말이죠.
